<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="es">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>R-Latino PRO - Cinema Ultra</title>
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/hls.js@latest">
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
            const videoPlayer = document.getElementById('video-player');
            if(videoPlayer) {
                videoPlayer.addEventListener('ended', () => {
                    if (currentPlayingItem && currentPlayingItem.fullPlaylist) {
                        const nextIndex = currentPlayingItem.playlistIndex + 1;
                        if (nextIndex < currentPlayingItem.fullPlaylist.length) {

                            // Mostrar mensaje de auto-play
                            const alertBox = document.createElement('div');
                            alertBox.style.cssText = "position:absolute; top:50%; left:50%; transform:translate(-50%, -50%); background:rgba(207,6,82,0.9); color:white; padding:20px 40px; font-size:30px; font-weight:bold; border-radius:15px; z-index:100000; box-shadow:0 0 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.8);";
                            alertBox.innerText = "Reproduciendo siguiente capítulo...";
                            document.getElementById('player-section').appendChild(alertBox);

                            setTimeout(() => {
                                alertBox.remove();
                                playMedia(currentPlayingItem.fullPlaylist[nextIndex]);
                            }, 3000);
                        }
                    }
                });
            }
        });

    </script>
    <style>
        :root { 
            --bg: #050505; 
            --side: #0f0f0f; 
            --accent: #cf0652; 
            --text: #fff; 
        }
        
        body { 
            margin: 0; 
            background: var(--bg); 
            color: var(--text); 
            font-family: sans-serif; 
            overflow: hidden; 
        }

        .focusable {
            outline: none;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: transform 0.15s ease, border-color 0.15s ease, background-color 0.15s ease;
            box-sizing: border-box;
            will-change: transform;
        }

        /* PANTALLA INICIAL */
        #home-screen { 
            display: flex; 
            flex-direction: column; 
            align-items: center; 
            justify-content: center; 
            height: 100vh; 
            background: radial-gradient(circle, #1a050d 0%, #000 100%); 
        }

        .home-grid { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: center; gap: 40px; padding: 40px; }
        .home-card { 
            width: 320px; 
            height: 450px; 
            border-radius: 25px; 
            display: flex; 
            flex-direction: column; 
            align-items: center; 
            justify-content: center; 
            background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
            border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
            
        }
        

        .home-card {
            background: rgba(17, 17, 17, 0.7) !important;
            border: 6px solid transparent !important;
            border-radius: 20px !important;
            width: 320px !important;
            height: 380px !important;
            display: flex !important;
            flex-direction: column !important;
            justify-content: center !important;
            align-items: center !important;
            margin: 20px !important;
            box-sizing: border-box !important;
            will-change: transform, box-shadow !important;
            transform: translateZ(0) !important;
            transition: transform 0.2s ease-out, box-shadow 0.2s ease-out, border 0.2s ease-out !important;
        }

        .home-card h2 {
            color: #ffffff !important;
            text-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8) !important;
            font-weight: bold !important;
            font-size: 2.8rem !important; /* HUGE */
            margin-top: 30px !important;
        }

        .home-card span {
            font-size: 130px !important; /* HUGE ICON */
            text-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.8) !important;
        }

        .home-card:focus { 
            transform: scale(1.1); 
            border-color: var(--accent); 
            background: rgba(207, 6, 82, 0.2);
            
        }

        /* INTERFAZ PRINCIPAL */
        #main-app { display: none; height: 100vh; }
        .sidebar { width: 380px; background: var(--side); display: flex; flex-direction: column; border-right: 2px solid #1a1a1a; }
        .sidebar-header { padding: 30px; font-size: 28px; font-weight: bold; color: var(--accent); text-align: center; border-bottom: 2px solid var(--accent); }
        .category-list { flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; scrollbar-width: none; }
        .cat-item { 
            width: 100%; 
            padding: 26px 15px; 
            text-align: left; 
            border: none; 
            border-bottom: 1px solid #1a1a1a; 
            font-size: 2rem; /* Texto responsivo */
            color: #eee; 
            display: block; 
            background: transparent; 
        }
        .cat-item:focus { 
            background: var(--accent); /* Fondo rojo para el cursor (movimiento) */
            color: white; 
            border-left: 5px solid white; /* Pequeño detalle blanco para el cursor */
            transform: scale(1.02);
            z-index: 10;
        }

        /* GRID POSTERS - MEJORA DE IMAGEN Y TEXTO */
        .content { flex: 1; padding: 0; overflow-y: auto; overflow-x: hidden; } /* 0 padding para llegar a los bordes */

        .card {
            width: 290px;
            height: 450px;
            background: #111;
            border-radius: 20px;
            overflow: hidden;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            cursor: pointer;
            transform: translateZ(0);
            transition: transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), border 0.3s, box-shadow 0.3s;
            border: 4px solid transparent;
            position: relative;
            margin: 0; /* Juntos por Gap */
        }

        .card img { 
            width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; 
            background: #000; 
            box-sizing: border-box; 
            border-radius: 14px; /* Evita que la imagen pinche las esquinas */ 
        }

        
        .card p { 
            position: absolute; 
            bottom: 0; 
            left: 0; 
            width: 100%; 
            min-height: 100px; 
            margin: 0; 
            padding: 10px 15px;
            font-size: 26px; /* Letras super grandes */
            line-height: 1.2;
            text-align: center; 
            font-weight: bold; 
            color: #fff; 
            background: linear-gradient(transparent, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.95) 40%); 
            display: flex; 
            align-items: flex-end; 
            justify-content: center; 
            box-sizing: border-box;
            transition: background 0.2s;
            border-bottom-left-radius: 14px;
            border-bottom-right-radius: 14px;
        }

        /* Título SOLAMENTE para películas/series en la lista M3U (Arriba y más oscuro) */
        .card p.m3u-title {
            top: 0;
            bottom: auto;
            min-height: 140px; /* Más espacio para el degradado */
            padding: 20px 15px 15px 15px;
            align-items: flex-start;
            border-bottom-left-radius: 0;
            border-bottom-right-radius: 0;
            border-top-left-radius: 14px;
            border-top-right-radius: 14px;
            /* Degradado intensificado: más negro sólido al inicio y baja suavemente */
            background: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(0,0,0,1) 0%, rgba(0,0,0,0.95) 40%, rgba(0,0,0,0.6) 75%, transparent 100%);
            text-shadow: 3px 3px 6px rgba(0,0,0,1); /* Sombra intensa en las letras */
        }


        .grid { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; padding: 40px; padding-bottom: 200px; justify-content: flex-start; /* Siempre a la izquierda */ gap: 30px; } /* Alineado a la izquierda, llenando todo el ancho */
        
        

        .card:focus {
            transform: scale(1.08); /* Crece un poco más como Disney */
            border: 6px solid #ffffff; /* Borde blanco grueso */
            outline: none;
            /* Aquí está la magia del resplandor difuminado (Glow) */
            box-shadow: 0 10px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.8), 0 0 20px rgba(255,255,255,0.6) !important; /* Resplandor exterior difuminado */
            z-index: 10;
        }

        /* IMAGEN SIN ZOOM (CONTAIN) */
        

        /* TITULO SOBRE CRISTAL (SIN DEGRADADO NEGRO) */
        

        /* PLAYER */
        #player-section { display: none; position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; background: #000; z-index: 9999; }
        video { width: 100%; height: 100%; }

        #status-msg { 
            position: absolute; 
            top: 40px; 
            left: 40px; 
            transform: translateX(0) translateY(0) !important; /* TV Safe */
            background: transparent; 
            padding: 0; 
            border: none; 
            z-index: 10003; 
            transition: opacity 0.4s; 
            font-weight: bold; 
            font-size: 38px; 
            color: #fff; 
            opacity: 0;
            max-width: 90%;
            white-space: nowrap;
            overflow: hidden;
            text-overflow: ellipsis;
            text-shadow: 2px 2px 10px rgba(0,0,0,1);
            text-align: left;
        }
        #status-msg.visible { 
            transform: translateX(0) translateY(0) !important; 
            opacity: 1;
        }

        #osd-icon { position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 50%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(0); width: 120px; height: 120px; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.6); border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; z-index: 10005; opacity: 0; transition: 0.3s; }
        #osd-icon.show { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1); opacity: 1; }
        #osd-icon svg { width: 60px; height: 60px; fill: white; }

        #movie-controls { position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 160px; background: linear-gradient(transparent, rgba(0,0,0,0.95)); display: none; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; padding: 0 80px; box-sizing: border-box; }
        .progress-container {
            position: relative;
            width: 100%;
            height: 6px;
            background: #2a2a2a;
            border-radius: 6px;
            margin-bottom: 25px;
            cursor: pointer;
            overflow: visible;
        }
        .buffer-fill {
            position: absolute;
            left: 0;
            top: 0;
            height: 100%;
            width: 0%;
            background: #7a7a7a;
            border-radius: 6px;
            transition: width 0.2s linear;
            z-index: 1;
        }
        .progress-fill {
            position: absolute;
            left: 0;
            top: 0;
            height: 100%;
            background: var(--accent); /* Rojo */
            width: 0%;
            border-radius: 6px;
            z-index: 2;
        }
        .progress-dot {
            position: absolute;
            top: 50%;
            width: 16px;
            height: 16px;
            background: var(--accent); /* Circulo rojo sólido, sin borde blanco */
            border: none;
            border-radius: 50%;
            transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
            transition: left 0.1s linear;
            z-index: 3;
            box-shadow: 0 0 5px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
        }.buffer-fill {
            position: absolute;
            left: 0;
            top: 0;
            height: 100%;
            width: 0%;
            background: #888888;
            border-radius: 6px;
            transition: width 0.2s linear;
            z-index: 1;
        }
        .progress-fill {
            position: absolute;
            left: 0;
            top: 0;
            height: 100%;
            background: var(--accent); /* Rojo */
            width: 0%;
            border-radius: 6px;
            z-index: 2;
        }
        .progress-dot {
            position: absolute;
            top: 50%;
            width: 16px;
            height: 16px;
            background: var(--accent);
            border: none;
            border-radius: 50%;
            transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
            transition: left 0.1s linear;
            z-index: 3;
        }
        .time-info { font-size: 34px; font-weight: bold; text-align: center; color: white; width: 100%; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; }

        #quick-list-overlay { position: absolute; left: -420px; top: 0; width: 400px; height: 100%; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.95); transition: 0.25s; padding: 30px; box-sizing: border-box; z-index: 10001; overflow-y: auto; scrollbar-width: none; }
        #quick-list-overlay::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; }
        #side-list { display: flex; flex-direction: column; padding-bottom: 50px; }
        #quick-list-overlay.visible { left: 0; }
        .quick-item { width: 100%; padding: 20px; background: #1a1a1a; margin-bottom: 10px; text-align: left; border-radius: 10px; color: white; font-size: 26px; /* TAMAÑO DE LETRA LISTA TV EN VIVO (Izquierda) */ font-weight: bold; border: 2px solid transparent; display: block; }
        .quick-item:focus { border-color: var(--accent); background: #333; outline: none; }

        #speed-tag { position: absolute; top: 150px; right: 100px; background: var(--accent); padding: 15px 30px; border-radius: 15px; font-size: 30px; display: none; color: white; }
        #loader { display: none; position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 50%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); z-index: 10002; }
        .spinner { border: 8px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border-left-color: var(--accent); border-radius: 50%; width: 70px; height: 70px; animation: spin 0.8s linear infinite; }
        @keyframes spin { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }
    
        #search-input:focus {
            border-color: #ffea00;
            transform: scale(1.01);
            box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(255, 234, 0, 0.4);
        }
        
    .active-cat { 
            background: transparent !important; /* Sin fondo sólido */
            color: var(--accent) !important; /* Texto rojo intenso */
            font-weight: bold; 
            border-left: 5px solid var(--accent) !important; /* Borde izquierdo rojo */
        }
        /* Y si el cursor pasa por encima del seleccionado, que el cursor gane y sea rojo entero */
        .active-cat:focus {
            background: var(--accent) !important;
            color: white !important;
            border-left: 5px solid white !important;
        }
    
        /* FORZAR FONDO GLOBAL TV-COMPATIBLE CON BASE64 */
        html, body { 
            background-color: #000 !important;
            background-image: url("data:image/jpeg;base64,") !important;
            background-position: center center !important;
            background-size: cover !important;
            background-repeat: no-repeat !important;
            background-attachment: fixed !important;
            height: 100%; 
            width: 100%;
        }

        /* CONTENEDORES TRANSPARENTES PARA QUE SE VEA EL FONDO */
        #home-screen { 
            background: transparent !important; 
        }
        #main-app {
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.6) !important;
        }
        .sidebar {
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.85) !important;
        }

        
        .home-card {
            background: rgba(17, 17, 17, 0.7) !important;
            border: 6px solid transparent !important;
            border-radius: 20px !important;
            width: 320px !important;
            height: 380px !important;
            display: flex !important;
            flex-direction: column !important;
            justify-content: center !important;
            align-items: center !important;
            margin: 20px !important;
            box-sizing: border-box !important;
            will-change: transform, box-shadow !important;
            transform: translateZ(0) !important;
            transition: transform 0.2s ease-out, box-shadow 0.2s ease-out, border 0.2s ease-out !important;
        }

        

        


        /* TEXTO BLANCO EN LAS LETRAS (VIVO, CINE, SERIES) */
        

        /* BORDE BLANCO RESPLANDECIENTE AL SELECCIONAR (EL MISMO QUE EN LAS PELICULAS) */

        .home-card {
            background: rgba(17, 17, 17, 0.7) !important;
            border: 6px solid transparent !important;
            border-radius: 20px !important;
            width: 320px !important;
            height: 380px !important;
            display: flex !important;
            flex-direction: column !important;
            justify-content: center !important;
            align-items: center !important;
            margin: 20px !important;
            box-sizing: border-box !important;
            will-change: transform, box-shadow !important;
            transform: translateZ(0) !important;
            transition: transform 0.2s ease-out, box-shadow 0.2s ease-out, border 0.2s ease-out !important;
        }

        .home-card h2 {
            color: #ffffff !important;
            text-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8) !important;
            font-weight: bold !important;
            font-size: 2.8rem !important; /* HUGE */
            margin-top: 30px !important;
        }

        .home-card span {
            font-size: 130px !important; /* HUGE ICON */
            text-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.8) !important;
        }

        .home-card:focus {
            transform: scale(1.1) !important;
            border: 6px solid #ffffff !important;
            outline: none !important;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.8), 0 0 15px rgba(255,255,255,0.8), 0 0 30px rgba(255,255,255,0.5) !important;
            z-index: 10 !important;
        }

    
        .resume-btn { border: 4px solid transparent; transition: 0.2s; }
        .resume-btn:focus { border: 4px solid white !important; transform: scale(1.05); }
    
        .track-item { background: transparent; border: 4px solid transparent; color: white; font-size: 1.4rem; text-align: left; padding: 10px 15px; cursor: pointer; outline: none; border-radius: 5px; font-weight: 500; transition: 0.2s; }
        .track-item:focus { border-color: white; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.2); transform: scale(1.05); }
        .track-item.active { color: white; font-weight: bold; background: rgba(229, 9, 20, 0.2); border-left-color: #e50914; }
        #btn-tracks:focus { border: 4px solid white !important; transform: scale(1.05); }
    
        #btn-play-serie:focus { background: var(--accent) !important; color: white !important; transform: scale(1.05); }
        #btn-trailer-serie:focus, #btn-add-serie:focus { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.8) !important; color: black !important; transform: scale(1.05); }

        .serie-banner {
            position: relative;
            flex: 0 0 calc(100% + 80px);
            margin-left: -40px;
            margin-top: -40px !important;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            height: 70vh;
            border-radius: 0;
            overflow: hidden;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            justify-content: flex-end;
            padding: 50px 80px;
            box-sizing: border-box;
            z-index: 1;
        }

        /* CAPA DE IMAGEN CON DIFUMINADO TRANSPARENTE (MÁSCARA) */
        .serie-banner::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%;
            background-image: var(--bg-image);
            background-size: cover;
            background-position: top;
            z-index: -2;
            /* Fundido perfecto hacia abajo (transparente) dejando ver el azul de tu app */
            -webkit-mask-image: linear-gradient(to top, transparent 0%, black 25%, black 100%);
            mask-image: linear-gradient(to top, transparent 0%, black 25%, black 100%);
        }
        /* Sombras para legibilidad del texto (sin arruinar el fondo azul) */
        .serie-banner .overlay-right {
            position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%;
            background: linear-gradient(to right, rgba(0,0,0,0.95) 0%, rgba(0,0,0,0.6) 40%, transparent 100%);
            z-index: -1;
        }
        .serie-banner .overlay-bottom {
            position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 40%;
            background: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(0,0,0,0.7) 0%, transparent 100%);
            z-index: -1;
        }

    </style>
</head>
<body>

    <div id="home-screen">
        <h1 style="
    margin-bottom: 50px; 
    font-size: 4.5rem; 
    font-weight: bold; 
    color: #ffffff;
    text-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7);
    letter-spacing: 1px;
">TV PERU 2026</h1>
        <div class="home-grid">
            <button class="home-card focusable" id="btn-live" onclick="startApp('live')"><span style="font-size:90px">📺</span><h2>VIVO</h2></button>
            <button class="home-card focusable" onclick="startApp('vod')"><span style="font-size:90px">🎬</span><h2>CINE</h2></button>
            <button class="home-card focusable" onclick="startApp('series')"><span style="font-size:90px">🎥</span><h2>SERIES</h2></button>
            <button class="home-card focusable" onclick="startApp('m3u')">
                <span style="font-size:90px">📑</span>
                <h2>LISTA M3U</h2>
            </button>
        </div>
    </div>
    <div id="main-app">
        <div class="sidebar">
            <div class="sidebar-header" id="sidebar-header-text">CATEGORÍAS</div>
            <div class="category-list" id="cat-container"></div>
        </div>
        <div class="content">
            <div id="search-bar" style="display:none; gap:15px; margin-bottom:30px; width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box;">
                <input type="text" id="search-input" class="focusable" placeholder="Escribe para buscar y presiona Enter/OK..." style="flex:1; padding:20px 25px; font-size: 2rem; line-height: 1.2; border-radius:15px; background:#111; color:#fff; border:6px solid transparent; outline:none; transition: 0.2s;">
            </div>
            <div class="grid" id="content-grid"></div></div>
    </div>

    
            
    <div id="player-section">
<div id="resume-overlay" style="display:none; position:absolute; top:0; left:0; width:100%; height:100%; background:rgba(0,0,0,0.8); z-index:100000; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; justify-content:center;">
                <h1 style="color:white; font-size:3.5rem; margin-bottom:20px; font-weight:bold; text-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.8);">¿Reanudar reproducción?</h1>
                <p id="resume-time" style="color:#ddd; font-size:1.8rem; margin-bottom:50px;">Te quedaste en: 00:00</p>
                <div style="display:flex; gap:30px;">
                    <button id="btn-resume" class="resume-btn focusable" style="padding:20px 60px; font-size:1.6rem; font-weight:bold; background:var(--accent); color:white; border-radius:15px; box-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(207,6,82,0.5); outline:none;">REANUDAR</button>
                    <button id="btn-restart" class="resume-btn focusable" style="padding:20px 60px; font-size:1.6rem; font-weight:bold; background:#333; color:white; border-radius:15px; outline:none;">EMPEZAR DE CERO</button>
                </div>
            </div>
        <div id="osd-icon"></div>
        <div id="status-msg"></div>
        <div id="osd-title" style="position:absolute; top:40px; left:50px; color:#fff; font-size:36px; font-weight:bold; font-family:sans-serif; text-shadow: 2px 2px 10px rgba(0,0,0,1); z-index:100; opacity:0; transition:opacity 0.3s; pointer-events:none;"></div>
        <div id="speed-tag"></div>
        <div id="loader">
        <div class="spinner"></div>
        <div id="buffer-percent" style="color: white; font-size: 24px; font-weight: bold; margin-top: 20px; text-align: center; text-shadow: 0 0 10px var(--accent);">0%</div>
    </div>
        <video id="video-player"></video>
        <div id="movie-controls">
            <div class="progress-container"><div class="progress-fill" id="p-fill"></div><div class="progress-dot" id="p-dot"></div></div>
            <div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; margin-top:10px;">
                <div class="time-info" id="time-display" style="margin:0; text-align:left;">00:00 / 00:00</div>
                <button id="btn-tracks" class="focusable" onclick="changeAudioTrack()" style="background:rgba(50,50,50,0.8); color:white; border:4px solid transparent; border-radius:8px; padding:10px 20px; font-size:1.5rem; font-weight:bold; cursor:pointer; outline:none; transition:0.2s;"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="24" height="24" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" style="vertical-align: sub; margin-right: 8px;"><path d="M21 11.5a8.38 8.38 0 0 1-.9 3.8 8.5 8.5 0 0 1-7.6 4.7 8.38 8.38 0 0 1-3.8-.9L3 21l1.9-5.7a8.38 8.38 0 0 1-.9-3.8 8.5 8.5 0 0 1 4.7-7.6 8.38 8.38 0 0 1 3.8-.9h.5a8.48 8.48 0 0 1 8 8v.5z"></path></svg> Idiomas y Subtítulos</button>
            </div>
            
        </div>
        <div id="track-menu" style="display:none; position:absolute; right:40px; bottom:160px; background:rgba(20,20,20,0.95); border:2px solid #444; border-radius:12px; padding:30px; z-index:10005; flex-direction:row; gap:40px; box-shadow:0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.8);">
            <div style="display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:10px; min-width:200px; max-height:400px; overflow-y:auto;">
                <h3 style="color:#888; font-size:1.3rem; margin:0 0 10px 0; border-bottom:2px solid #444; padding-bottom:10px; text-transform:uppercase;">Audio</h3>
                <div id="audio-list" style="display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:5px;"></div>
            </div>
            <div style="display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:10px; min-width:200px; max-height:400px; overflow-y:auto;">
                <h3 style="color:#888; font-size:1.3rem; margin:0 0 10px 0; border-bottom:2px solid #444; padding-bottom:10px; text-transform:uppercase;">Subtítulos</h3>
                <div id="sub-list" style="display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:5px;"></div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div id="quick-list-overlay"><div id="side-list"></div></div>
    </div>

    <script>

        // ==========================================
        // MEJORA: CORRECCIÓN DE SCROLL EN LISTAS Y SERIES
        // ==========================================
        function resetContentScroll() {
            const content = document.querySelector('.content');
            if (content) {
                content.scrollTop = 0;
                content.scrollLeft = 0;
            }
        }


        function smartScroll(element) {
            if (!element) return;
            var container = element.parentElement;
            while(container && container !== document.body) {
                var cs = window.getComputedStyle(container);
                if (cs.overflowY === 'auto' || cs.overflowY === 'scroll' || container.className === 'content') {
                    break;
                }
                container = container.parentElement;
            }

            if (container && container !== document.body) {
                var elRect = element.getBoundingClientRect();
                var contRect = container.getBoundingClientRect();

                if (elRect.top < contRect.top) {
                    container.scrollTop -= (contRect.top - elRect.top + 80);
                } 
                else if (elRect.bottom > contRect.bottom) {
                    container.scrollTop += (elRect.bottom - contRect.bottom + 80);
                }
            } else {
                if (element.scrollIntoViewIfNeeded) {
                    element.scrollIntoViewIfNeeded(false);
                }
            }
        }

        const config = { host: 'http://rlatinop.com:8880', user: 'faueazqemn', pass: 'DakS9wbL9qsb' };
        let m3uGlobalItems = [];
        window.appCache = {};
        window.tmdbCache = {};
        async function fetchWithCache(url) {
            if (window.appCache[url]) {
                console.log("Cargado desde caché local:", url);
                return window.appCache[url];
            }
            const res = await fetch(url);
            const data = await res.json();
            window.appCache[url] = data;
            return data;
        }
        
        
        
        const tmdbCache = {};

        // ====== DICCIONARIO DE MARCOS PARA LAS PLATAFORMAS ======
        // Aquí podrás poner los links a tus imágenes PNG transparentes cuando las subas.
        // Si tienes más plataformas, solo añádelas a la lista (en minúsculas).
        const marcosPlataformas = {
            'netflix': 'https://i.ibb.co/5hb1Cr1D/marco-netflix.png',
            'disney': 'https://i.ibb.co/Dfy2mLZF/marco-disney.png',
            'amazon': 'https://i.ibb.co/B2mXKMyS/marco-primevideo.png',
            'hbo': 'https://i.ibb.co/s9k2dDzT/marco-hbo.png',
            'apple': 'https://i.ibb.co/jk0V3mfc/marco-appletv.png',
            'hulu': 'https://i.ibb.co/sdnxVrJZ/marco-hulu.png',
            'paramount': 'https://i.ibb.co/q3fqDN5b/marco-paramount.png',
        };

        const customM3uCovers = {
            'Películas 2025': 'https://i.ibb.co/wD80DWL/Pel-culas-2025.png',
            'Películas 2026': 'https://i.ibb.co/qFMvbP63/Pel-culas-2026.png', // Reemplazar si tienes otra url
            // Agrega más carpetas aquí:
            // 'Nombre de la Carpeta': 'https://url-de-tu-imagen.jpg',
        };

const m3uPlaylists = [
            { name: 'SAGAS', url: 'https://mpaste.vercel.app/raw/2KV1mM', image: 'https://i.ibb.co/1kCY3TL/sagas.png' },
            { name: 'ANIMES', url: 'https://mpaste.vercel.app/raw/Rn2E39', image: 'https://i.ibb.co/DfSVHjgx/Anime.png' },
            { name: 'PELÍCULAS', url: 'https://mpaste.vercel.app/raw/hs0TpM', image: 'https://i.ibb.co/ZzksK21P/PELICULAS.jpg' },
            { name: 'Telenovelas', url: 'https://mpaste.vercel.app/raw/lRnfG8', image: 'https://i.ibb.co/RTQxD4LR/telenovelas.png' },
            { name: 'Series', url: 'https://mpaste.vercel.app/raw/dwMze8', image: 'https://i.ibb.co/cXSk3f1y/series.png' }
        ];
        let currentM3uUrl = '';

        let hls = null, currentType = 'live', activeId = null, lastFocusedCardId = null;
        let controlsTimeout, seekInterval, currentSpeed = 1;
        
        // --- INICIO SISTEMA DE CARGA Y BUFFER ROBUSTO ---
        window.bufferSimInterval = null;

        window.startBufferSimulation = function() {
            clearInterval(window.bufferSimInterval);
            const percentEl = document.getElementById('buffer-percent');
            if(!percentEl) return;

            document.getElementById('loader').style.display = 'block';
            let current = parseInt(percentEl.innerText) || 0;
            if (current >= 100) current = 0;

            window.bufferSimInterval = setInterval(() => {
                if (current < 99) {
                    current += Math.floor(Math.random() * 8) + 2; 
                    if (current > 99) current = 99; 
                    percentEl.innerText = current + '%';
                }
            }, 100);
        };

        window.stopBufferSimulation = function() {
            clearInterval(window.bufferSimInterval);
            const percentEl = document.getElementById('buffer-percent');
            if(percentEl) percentEl.innerText = '100%';
            setTimeout(() => { document.getElementById('loader').style.display = 'none'; }, 200);
        };
        // --- FIN SISTEMA DE CARGA ---

const icons = {
            pause: `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M6 19h4V5H6v14zm8-14v14h4V5h-4z"/></svg>`,
            play: `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M8 5v14l11-7z"/></svg>`
        };

        window.onload = () => {
            document.getElementById('btn-live').focus();
            window.history.pushState({view: "home"}, "");
            const v = document.getElementById('video-player');
            v.preload = 'auto';
            v.onpause = () => {
                triggerOSD('pause');
                if (currentType !== 'live' && document.getElementById('player-section').style.display === 'block') {
                    clearTimeout(controlsTimeout);
                    clearTimeout(window.titleTimer);
                    document.getElementById('movie-controls').style.display = 'flex';
                    document.getElementById('status-msg').classList.add('visible');
                }
            };
            v.onplay = () => {
                triggerOSD('play');
                if (currentType !== 'live' && document.getElementById('player-section').style.display === 'block') {
                    clearTimeout(controlsTimeout);
                    controlsTimeout = setTimeout(() => {
                        const tm = document.getElementById('track-menu');
                        if (!seekInterval && (!tm || tm.style.display !== 'flex')) {
                            document.getElementById('movie-controls').style.display = 'none';
                            document.getElementById('status-msg').classList.remove('visible');
                        }
                    }, 3000);
                }
            };
            v.onwaiting = () => { document.getElementById('loader').style.display='block'; };
            v.onplaying = () => { document.getElementById('loader').style.display='none'; };
            v.ontimeupdate = updateMovieUI;
        };

        function triggerOSD(type) {
            const osd = document.getElementById('osd-icon');
            const txt = type === 'play' ? 'PLAY' : 'PAUSADO';

            // Inyectamos el ícono SVG original y luego el texto abajo flotando
            osd.innerHTML = icons[type] + `<div style="position:absolute; bottom:-55px; width:200%; text-align:left; font-size:36px; font-weight:bold; text-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.9); color:white; letter-spacing:4px;">${txt}</div>`;

            osd.classList.add('show');
            // Damos un poco más de tiempo para leer PLAY (800ms en lugar de 500)
            if (type === 'play') {
                setTimeout(() => osd.classList.remove('show'), 800);
            }
        }

        let lastSaveTime = 0;
        let activeItemData = null; // To store the full item data for history
        function updateMovieUI() {
            const v = document.getElementById('video-player');
            if (activeId && v.duration && !isNaN(v.duration) && v.duration !== Infinity && currentType !== 'live') {
                const now = Date.now();
                if (now - lastSaveTime > 5000) { // Guardar cada 5 segundos
                    saveHistory(activeId, v.currentTime, v.duration, activeItemData);
                    lastSaveTime = now;
                }
            }
            v.preload = 'auto';
            if (currentType !== 'live' && v.duration) {
                const perc = (v.currentTime / v.duration) * 100;
                document.getElementById('p-fill').style.width = perc + "%";
                document.getElementById('p-dot').style.left = perc + "%";
                document.getElementById('time-display').innerText = formatTime(v.currentTime) + " / " + formatTime(v.duration);
            }
        }

        function formatTime(s) {
            let h = Math.floor(s / 3600);
            let m = Math.floor((s % 3600) / 60);
            let sec = Math.floor(s % 60);
            return (h > 0 ? h + ":" : "") + (m < 10 ? "0" + m : m) + ":" + (sec < 10 ? "0" + sec : sec);
        }

        document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
            const isPlayer = document.getElementById('player-section').style.display === 'block';
            const v = document.getElementById('video-player');
            v.preload = 'auto';

            // Interceptar botón ATRÁS (LG WebOS: 461, ESC: 27) si el popup de reanudar está abierto
            const resumeOverlay = document.getElementById('resume-overlay');
            const isResumeOpen = resumeOverlay && resumeOverlay.style.display === 'flex';
            if (isResumeOpen && (e.keyCode === 461 || e.keyCode === 27 || e.keyCode === 10009)) {
                e.preventDefault();
                e.stopPropagation();
                closePlayer();
                return;
            }

            if (isResumeOpen) {
                const btnRes = document.getElementById('btn-resume');
                const btnStart = document.getElementById('btn-restart');
                if (e.keyCode === 39) { e.preventDefault(); btnStart.focus(); }
                if (e.keyCode === 37) { e.preventDefault(); btnRes.focus(); }
                if (e.keyCode === 13) { 
                    e.preventDefault(); 
                    if (document.activeElement === btnStart) btnStart.click(); 
                    else btnRes.click(); 
                }
                return;
            }

            if (isPlayer) {
                showTitleTemp();
                if (currentType === 'live') handleLiveKeys(e);
                else handleMovieKeys(e, v);
                return;
            }

            const cur = document.activeElement;
            const bannerBtns = ['btn-play-serie', 'btn-trailer-serie', 'btn-add-serie'];

            if (e.keyCode === 40) { 
                e.preventDefault(); 
                if (cur.classList.contains('cat-item')) { 
                    if(cur.nextElementSibling) cur.nextElementSibling.focus(); 
                } else if(cur.id === 'search-input' || cur.id === 'btn-reload-m3u') { 
                    const f = document.querySelector('.card'); if(f) f.focus(); 
                } else if (bannerBtns.indexOf(cur.id) > -1) {
                    const f = document.querySelector('.card'); if(f) f.focus();
                } else { 
                    moveGrid(40); 
                } 
            }
            else if (e.keyCode === 38) { 
                e.preventDefault(); 
                if (cur.classList.contains('cat-item')) { 
                    if(cur.previousElementSibling) cur.previousElementSibling.focus(); 
                } else if (cur.classList.contains('card')) {
                    const cards = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.card'));
                    const idx = cards.indexOf(cur);
                    const sb = document.getElementById('search-bar');
                    const btnM3u = document.getElementById('btn-reload-m3u');
                    const btnPlaySerie = document.getElementById('btn-play-serie');

                    if (idx >= 0 && cards[idx].offsetTop === cards[0].offsetTop) {
                        if (btnPlaySerie) {
                            btnPlaySerie.focus();
                        } else if (sb && sb.style.display !== 'none') {
                            document.getElementById('search-input').focus();
                        } else if (btnM3u) {
                            btnM3u.focus();
                        } else {
                            moveGrid(38);
                        }
                    } else {
                        moveGrid(38);
                    }
                } else {
                    moveGrid(38);
                } 
            }
            else if (e.keyCode === 39) { 
                e.preventDefault(); 
                if (cur.classList.contains('cat-item')) { 
                    const btnPlaySerie = document.getElementById('btn-play-serie');
                    const f = document.querySelector('.card'); 
                    if(btnPlaySerie) btnPlaySerie.focus();
                    else if(f) f.focus(); 
                } else if (cur.id === 'btn-play-serie') {
                    document.getElementById('btn-trailer-serie').focus();
                } else if (cur.id === 'btn-trailer-serie') {
                    document.getElementById('btn-add-serie').focus();
                } else { 
                    moveGrid(39); 
                } 
            }
            else if (e.keyCode === 37) { 
                e.preventDefault(); 
                if (cur.id === 'btn-add-serie') {
                    document.getElementById('btn-trailer-serie').focus();
                } else if (cur.id === 'btn-trailer-serie') {
                    document.getElementById('btn-play-serie').focus();
                } else if (cur.id === 'btn-play-serie' || cur.classList.contains('card') || cur.id === 'search-input') { 
                    if (document.querySelector('.sidebar').style.display !== 'none') {
                        const act = document.querySelector('.active-cat'); 
                        if(act) act.focus(); 
                        else {
                            const firstCat = document.querySelector('.cat-item');
                            if(firstCat) firstCat.focus();
                        }
                    } else {
                        moveGrid(37);
                    }
                } else { moveGrid(37); } 
            }
            
            if (e.keyCode === 13) cur.click();
            if (e.keyCode === 461 || e.keyCode === 27 || e.keyCode === 10009) window.history.back();
        });

        function showTitleTemp() {
            const s = document.getElementById('status-msg');
            s.classList.add('visible');
            clearTimeout(window.titleTimer);
            window.titleTimer = setTimeout(() => s.classList.remove('visible'), 5000);
        }

        function handleMovieKeys(e, v) {
            const ctrl = document.getElementById('movie-controls');
            const trackMenu = document.getElementById('track-menu');
            const isMenuOpen = trackMenu && trackMenu.style.display === 'flex';
            const cur = document.activeElement;

            if (isMenuOpen) {
                if (e.keyCode === 461 || e.keyCode === 27 || e.keyCode === 10009) {
                    e.preventDefault(); 
                    window.history.back(); 
                    return;
                }
                if (e.keyCode === 13) {
                    if(cur && cur.classList.contains('track-item')) { cur.click(); }
                    return;
                }

                // Spatial Navigation inside the track menu
                const isAudio = cur && cur.parentElement && cur.parentElement.id === 'audio-list';
                const isSub = cur && cur.parentElement && cur.parentElement.id === 'sub-list';

                if (e.keyCode === 40) { // DOWN
                    e.preventDefault();
                    if (cur && cur.nextElementSibling && cur.nextElementSibling.classList.contains('track-item')) {
                        cur.nextElementSibling.focus();
                    }
                } else if (e.keyCode === 38) { // UP
                    e.preventDefault();
                    if (cur && cur.previousElementSibling && cur.previousElementSibling.classList.contains('track-item')) {
                        cur.previousElementSibling.focus();
                    } else {
                        // Close menu when going up from the top? No, just stay.
                    }
                } else if (e.keyCode === 39) { // RIGHT
                    e.preventDefault();
                    if (isAudio) {
                        const firstSub = document.querySelector('#sub-list .track-item.active') || document.querySelector('#sub-list .track-item');
                        if (firstSub) firstSub.focus();
                    }
                } else if (e.keyCode === 37) { // LEFT
                    e.preventDefault();
                    if (isSub) {
                        const firstAudio = document.querySelector('#audio-list .track-item.active') || document.querySelector('#audio-list .track-item');
                        if (firstAudio) firstAudio.focus();
                    }
                }
                return; // Do not process other keys while menu is open
            }

            // Normal Movie Controls
            const statusMsg = document.getElementById('status-msg');
            if (ctrl.style.display !== 'flex') {
                ctrl.style.display = 'flex';
            }
            statusMsg.classList.add('visible'); clearTimeout(window.titleTimer);

            clearTimeout(controlsTimeout);
            if (!v.paused) {
                controlsTimeout = setTimeout(() => {
                    if (!seekInterval && (!trackMenu || trackMenu.style.display !== 'flex')) {
                        ctrl.style.display = 'none';
                        statusMsg.classList.remove('visible');
                    }
                }, 3000);
            }

            const isBtnFocused = cur && cur.id === 'btn-tracks';

            if (e.keyCode === 13) { 
                if (cur && cur.id === 'btn-tracks') {
                    populateTracks();
                    trackMenu.style.display = 'flex';
                    setTimeout(() => {
                        const firstAudio = document.querySelector('#audio-list .track-item.active') || document.querySelector('#audio-list .track-item');
                        if(firstAudio) firstAudio.focus();
                    }, 50);
                } else {
                    if (v.paused) v.play(); else v.pause(); 
                }
            } else if (e.keyCode === 39 || e.keyCode === 37) { // RIGHT or LEFT
                if (isBtnFocused) {
                    /* VLC nav removed */
                    return;
                }

                if (!isNaN(v.duration) && v.duration !== Infinity) {
                    if (!seekInterval) {
                        window.targetSeekTime = v.currentTime;
                        // REMOVIDO EL v.pause() - LG WebOS a menudo cancela el salto si el video está pausado.
                        // Lo dejamos reproduciendo en segundo plano mientras la barra avanza visualmente.
                    }

                    // Aumentar los segundos internamente
                    currentSpeed = Math.min((currentSpeed === 1 ? 2 : currentSpeed * 2), 16); // Límite máximo x16

                    // Multiplicamos 10 segundos por la velocidad actual (Ej: x4 = salta 40s por pulso)
                    let skipSeconds = 10 * currentSpeed; 
                    window.targetSeekTime += (e.keyCode === 39 ? skipSeconds : -skipSeconds);

                    if (window.targetSeekTime < 0) window.targetSeekTime = 0;
                    if (window.targetSeekTime > v.duration) window.targetSeekTime = v.duration;

                    // ACTUALIZACIÓN UI MANUAL
                    const perc = (window.targetSeekTime / v.duration) * 100;
                    document.getElementById('p-fill').style.width = perc + "%";
                    document.getElementById('p-dot').style.left = perc + "%";

                    let hs = Math.floor(window.targetSeekTime / 3600);
                    let ms = Math.floor((window.targetSeekTime % 3600) / 60);
                    let ss = Math.floor(window.targetSeekTime % 60);
                    let txtS = (hs > 0 ? hs + ":" : "") + (ms < 10 ? "0" + ms : ms) + ":" + (ss < 10 ? "0" + ss : ss);
                    let hd = Math.floor(v.duration / 3600);
                    let md = Math.floor((v.duration % 3600) / 60);
                    let sd = Math.floor(v.duration % 60);
                    let txtD = (hd > 0 ? hd + ":" : "") + (md < 10 ? "0" + md : md) + ":" + (sd < 10 ? "0" + sd : sd);

                    document.getElementById('time-display').innerText = txtS + " / " + txtD;

                    document.getElementById('speed-tag').innerText = (e.keyCode === 39 ? ">> " : "<< ") + currentSpeed + "x";
                    document.getElementById('speed-tag').style.display = 'block';

                    seekInterval = true;
                }
            } else if (e.keyCode === 40) { // DOWN
                e.preventDefault();
                const tbtn = document.getElementById('btn-tracks');
                if (tbtn) tbtn.focus();
            } else if (e.keyCode === 38) { // UP
                e.preventDefault();
                if (isBtnFocused) cur.blur();
            } else if (e.keyCode === 461 || e.keyCode === 27 || e.keyCode === 10009) {
                window.history.back();
            }
        }

        function handleLiveKeys(e) {
            const overlay = document.getElementById('quick-list-overlay');
            if (e.keyCode === 13) {
                if (!overlay.classList.contains('visible')) {
                    overlay.classList.add('visible');
                    setTimeout(() => { 
                        const act = document.querySelector(`[data-id="${activeId}"]`); 
                        if(act) act.focus(); 
                        else if(document.querySelector('.quick-item')) document.querySelector('.quick-item').focus(); 
                    }, 50);
                } else if (document.activeElement.classList.contains('quick-item')) {
                    const data = JSON.parse(document.activeElement.getAttribute('data-full'));
                    if (data.stream_id !== activeId) playMedia(data);
                    overlay.classList.remove('visible');
                }
            } else if (e.keyCode === 39 || e.keyCode === 461 || e.keyCode === 27 || e.keyCode === 10009) {
                if (overlay.classList.contains('visible')) overlay.classList.remove('visible');
                else window.history.back();
            } else if (overlay.classList.contains('visible')) {
                if (e.keyCode === 40) { e.preventDefault(); const q = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.quick-item')); const i = q.indexOf(document.activeElement); if(q[i+1]) { q[i+1].focus(); smartScroll(q[i+1]); } }
                if (e.keyCode === 38) { e.preventDefault(); const q = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.quick-item')); const i = q.indexOf(document.activeElement); if(q[i-1]) { q[i-1].focus(); smartScroll(q[i-1]); } }
            }
        }

        document.addEventListener('keyup', (e) => {
            if (currentType !== 'live' && (e.keyCode === 39 || e.keyCode === 37)) {
                if (seekInterval) {
                    const v = document.getElementById('video-player');
                    if (window.targetSeekTime !== undefined) {
                        // AQUÍ ES CUANDO VERDADERAMENTE ORDENAMOS A LA TV MOVER EL VIDEO, SOLO AL SOLTAR
                        let target = window.targetSeekTime;
                        window.targetSeekTime = undefined;

                        // LG WebOS FIX: Asignar currentTime directo sin disparar play() simultáneo 
                        // porque si ya está en play, mandarle play() cancela la asignación de currentTime.
                        v.currentTime = target;
                        if (v.paused) {
                            v.play();
                        }
                    }
                }
                seekInterval = null; 
                currentSpeed = 1;
                document.getElementById('speed-tag').style.display = 'none';
            }
        });

        
        let searchDatabase = [];
        let searchTimeout = null;

        async function showSearchUI(type) {
            document.getElementById('content-grid').innerHTML = '<h2 style="width:100%; text-align:left; margin-top:50px;">Preparando buscador...</h2>';
            const searchBar = document.getElementById('search-bar');
            searchBar.style.display = 'flex';
            const input = document.getElementById('search-input');
            input.value = '';
            input.focus();
            

            try {
                if (type === 'm3u') {
                    searchDatabase = m3uGlobalItems;
                } else {
                    const action = (type === 'live') ? 'get_live_streams' : (type === 'vod' ? 'get_vod_streams' : 'get_series');
                    const data = await fetchWithCache(`${config.host}/player_api.php?username=${config.user}&password=${config.pass}&action=${action}`);
                    searchDatabase = Array.isArray(data) ? data : [];
                }
                document.getElementById('content-grid').innerHTML = '<h2 style="width:100%; text-align:left; margin-top:50px; color:#aaa;">Escribe para buscar...</h2>';
            } catch(e) {
                document.getElementById('content-grid').innerHTML = '<h2 style="width:100%; text-align:left; color:red;">Error cargando datos para buscar</h2>';
            }

            input.onkeydown = (e) => {
                if (e.keyCode === 13) {
                    e.preventDefault();
                    executeSearch();
                    input.blur(); 
                    const grid = document.getElementById('content-grid');
                    setTimeout(() => { if(grid.firstChild) grid.firstChild.focus(); }, 100);
                }
            };

            const handleTyping = () => {
                clearTimeout(searchTimeout);
                searchTimeout = setTimeout(() => { executeSearch(); }, 400); 
            };
            input.addEventListener('input', handleTyping);
            input.addEventListener('keyup', handleTyping);
        }

        function executeSearch() {
            const query = document.getElementById('search-input').value.trim().toLowerCase();
            const grid = document.getElementById('content-grid');

            if (!query) {
                grid.innerHTML = '<h2 style="width:100%; text-align:left; margin-top:50px; color:#aaa;">Escribe para buscar...</h2>';
                return;
            }

            try {
                const normalQuery = query; 
                const results = searchDatabase.filter(i => {
                    const itemName = i.name || i.title || '';
                    return itemName.toLowerCase().includes(normalQuery);
                });

                grid.innerHTML = '';
                if (results.length === 0) {
                    grid.innerHTML = `<h2 style="width:100%; text-align:left; margin-top:50px; color:#aaa;">No hay resultados para "${query}"</h2>`;
                    return;
                }

                results.slice(0, 100).forEach(item => {
                    const card = document.createElement('button');
                    card.className = 'card focusable';
                    card.id = 'card-' + (item.stream_id || item.id || Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9));
                    card.setAttribute('data-full', JSON.stringify(item));

                    let icon = item.stream_icon || item.cover || 'https://placehold.co/250x380/1a1a1a/cccccc/png?text=Sin\nPoster';
                    card.innerHTML = `<img src="${icon}" loading="lazy" decoding="async" onerror="this.src='https://placehold.co/250x380/1a1a1a/ff3333/png?text=Imagen\nRota'">${getProgressHtml(item.stream_id || item.id)}<p>${item.name || item.title || 'Desconocido'}</p>`;

                    card.onclick = () => {
                        lastFocusedCardId = card.id;
                        playMedia(item);
                    };
                    grid.appendChild(card);
                });
            } catch(e) {
                console.error("ExecuteSearch Error:", e);
                grid.innerHTML = '<h2 style="width:100%; text-align:left; margin-top:50px; color:red;">Error al buscar</h2>';
            }
        }

        
        // --- SISTEMA DE HISTORIAL Y PROGRESO ---
        function getHistory() {
            try { return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('rlatino_history')) || {}; } 
            catch(e) { return {}; }
        }
        function saveHistory(id, time, duration, itemData) {
            if (!id || duration <= 0) return;
            const history = getHistory();
            history[id] = { time, duration, item: itemData, timestamp: Date.now() };
            // Limpiar historial antiguo si pasa de 100 items
            const keys = Object.keys(history).sort((a,b) => history[b].timestamp - history[a].timestamp);
            if (keys.length > 100) delete history[keys[keys.length - 1]];
            localStorage.setItem('rlatino_history', JSON.stringify(history));
        }
        function getProgressHtml(id) {
            const h = getHistory()[id];
            if (h && h.duration > 0) {
                const perc = Math.min(100, Math.max(0, (h.time / h.duration) * 100));
                if (perc > 1 && perc < 98) { // Mostrar si vio más del 1% y menos del 98%
                    return `<div style="position:absolute; bottom:60px; left:0; width:100%; height:6px; background:rgba(255,255,255,0.3); z-index:10;"><div style="width:${perc}%; height:100%; background:#ffea00; box-shadow: 0 0 10px #ffea00; border-radius:0 2px 2px 0;"></div></div>`;
                }
            }
            return '';
        }

        
        function loadHistoryUI(currentViewType) {
            document.getElementById('search-bar').style.display = 'none';
            // No removemos el active-cat porque queremos que el botón "Seguir Viendo" se quede rojo

            const grid = document.getElementById('content-grid');
            grid.innerHTML = '<h2 style="width:100%; text-align:left; margin-top:50px;">Buscando recientes...</h2>';

            const history = getHistory();
            const keys = Object.keys(history).sort((a,b) => history[b].timestamp - history[a].timestamp);

            grid.innerHTML = '';
            if (keys.length === 0) {
                grid.innerHTML = '<h2 style="width:100%; text-align:left; margin-top:50px; color:#aaa;">No tienes películas recientes.</h2>';
                return;
            }

            // Título
            const header = document.createElement('h2');
            header.style.width = '100%';
            header.style.color = 'white';
            header.style.padding = '0 20px';
            header.style.marginBottom = '20px';
            header.innerHTML = '⏱ Películas que dejaste a medias:';
            grid.appendChild(header);

            keys.forEach(k => {
                const h = history[k];
                if (!h || !h.item || h.duration <= 0) return;
                if (h.time > (h.duration * 0.95)) return;

                const item = h.item;

                // Filtrar para que en CINE solo salgan peliculas, y en SERIES solo series.
                // En Xtream UI, los items de series tienen 'series_id', y los de VOD tienen 'stream_id' pero no 'series_id'
                const isSeriesItem = item.series_id || item.season;
                if (currentViewType === 'series' && !isSeriesItem) return;
                if (currentViewType === 'vod' && isSeriesItem) return;
                
                const card = document.createElement('button');
                card.className = 'card focusable';
                card.id = 'card-' + k;
                card.setAttribute('data-full', JSON.stringify(item));

                let icon = item.stream_icon || item.cover || 'https://placehold.co/250x380/1a1a1a/cccccc/png?text=Sin\nPoster';
                card.innerHTML = `<img src="${icon}" loading="lazy" decoding="async" onerror="this.src='https://placehold.co/250x380/1a1a1a/ff3333/png?text=Imagen\nRota'">${getProgressHtml(k)}<p>${item.name || item.title || 'Desconocido'}</p>`;

                card.onclick = () => {
                    lastFocusedCardId = card.id;
                    playMedia(item);
                };
                grid.appendChild(card);
            });

            // Si después del filtro no hay nada (porque las vio completas todas)
            if(grid.childElementCount <= 1) {
                grid.innerHTML = '<h2 style="width:100%; text-align:left; margin-top:50px; color:#aaa;">No tienes películas recientes pendientes.</h2>';
            } else {
                setTimeout(() => { if(grid.children[1]) grid.children[1].focus(); }, 100);
            }
        }

        
        function setActiveCat(btn) {
            document.querySelectorAll('.cat-item').forEach(el => el.classList.remove('active-cat'));
            if(btn) btn.classList.add('active-cat');
        }

        function startApp(type) {
            currentType = type;
            document.getElementById('home-screen').style.display = 'none';
            document.getElementById('main-app').style.display = 'flex';
            const typeNames = { 'live': 'TV EN VIVO', 'vod': 'CINE', 'series': 'SERIES', 'm3u': 'LISTAS M3U' };
            document.getElementById('sidebar-header-text').innerText = 'CATEGORÍA ' + (typeNames[type] || '');
            window.history.pushState({view: "main"}, "");
            loadCategories(type);
        }

        
        
        const TMDB_API_KEY = "a8314b812e95b9ed3100552a612c0f7d";

        
        // ====== OBSERVADOR PARA CARGAR MARCOS DE FORMA INTELIGENTE ======
        const frameObserver = new IntersectionObserver((entries, observer) => {
            entries.forEach(entry => {
                if (entry.isIntersecting) {
                    const card = entry.target;
                    const title = card.dataset.title;
                    const isTv = card.dataset.istv === 'true';
                    const frameImg = card.querySelector('.frame-overlay');

                    // Solo consultar si aún no lo hemos comprobado para esta tarjeta
                    if (frameImg && frameImg.style.display === 'none' && !card.dataset.checked) {
                        card.dataset.checked = 'true'; // Marcar como comprobado para no repetir
                        fetchTMDBData(title, isTv).then(info => {
                            if (info && info.platform) {
                                const urlMarco = marcosPlataformas[info.platform];
                                if (urlMarco && !urlMarco.includes('URL_AQUI')) {
                                    frameImg.src = urlMarco;
                                    frameImg.style.display = 'block';
                                }
                            }
                        }).catch(e => console.error("Error cargando marco TMDB:", e));
                    }
                }
            });
        }, { rootMargin: "300px" }); // Empieza a cargar los marcos 300px antes de que aparezcan en pantalla
        window.frameObserver = frameObserver;

        async function fetchTMDBData(query, isTv = false) {

            let cacheKey = query + "_" + isTv;
            if (window.tmdbCache && window.tmdbCache[cacheKey]) return window.tmdbCache[cacheKey];

            let cleanQuery = query.replace(/\(.*?\)/g, '').trim(); // Remove years like (2023)
            let type = isTv ? 'tv' : 'movie';
            let searchUrl = `https://api.themoviedb.org/3/search/${type}?api_key=${TMDB_API_KEY}&language=es-MX&query=${encodeURIComponent(cleanQuery)}`;

            try {
                const res = await fetch(searchUrl);
                const data = await res.json();
                if (data.results && data.results.length > 0) {
                    const item = data.results[0];
                    const detailsUrl = `https://api.themoviedb.org/3/${type}/${item.id}?api_key=${TMDB_API_KEY}&language=es-MX&append_to_response=images&include_image_language=en,null`;
                    const detailsRes = await fetch(detailsUrl);
                    const details = await detailsRes.json();

                    let overview = details.overview;

                    // Si no hay descripción en español, buscar en inglés
                    if (!overview || overview.trim() === '') {
                        try {
                            const enRes = await fetch(`https://api.themoviedb.org/3/${type}/${item.id}?api_key=${TMDB_API_KEY}&language=en-US`);
                            const enDetails = await enRes.json();
                            if (enDetails.overview && enDetails.overview.trim() !== '') {
                                // Traducir de inglés a español usando Google Translate API gratuita
                                const textToTranslate = encodeURIComponent(enDetails.overview);
                                const transRes = await fetch(`https://translate.googleapis.com/translate_a/single?client=gtx&sl=en&tl=es&dt=t&q=${textToTranslate}`);
                                const transData = await transRes.json();

                                // Google Translate devuelve un array de arrays con las oraciones traducidas
                                let translatedText = '';
                                if (transData && transData[0]) {
                                    transData[0].forEach(t => {
                                        if (t[0]) translatedText += t[0] + ' ';
                                    });
                                }
                                overview = translatedText.trim();
                            }
                        } catch(e) {
                            console.error("Error traduciendo", e);
                        }
                    }

                    if (!overview || overview.trim() === '') {
                        overview = 'Sin descripción disponible.';
                    }

                    
                    let logo = '';
                    if (details.images && details.images.logos && details.images.logos.length > 0) {
                        logo = 'https://image.tmdb.org/t/p/w500' + details.images.logos[0].file_path;
                    }

                    // ====== NUEVA LÓGICA PARA MARCOS (PLATAFORMAS) ======
                    let platformName = '';

                    // Buscar en todas partes: redes y productoras
                    let allEntities = '';
                    if (details.networks) allEntities += details.networks.map(n => n.name.toLowerCase()).join(' ') + ' ';
                    if (details.production_companies) allEntities += details.production_companies.map(c => c.name.toLowerCase()).join(' ') + ' ';

                    if (isTv && details.networks && details.networks.length > 0) {
                        platformName = details.networks[0].name.toLowerCase();
                    } else if (!isTv && details.production_companies && details.production_companies.length > 0) {
                        platformName = details.production_companies[0].name.toLowerCase();
                    }

                    // console.log("Revisando: ", details.name || details.title, "| Redes:", allEntities);

                    // Fuerza la búsqueda inteligente en redes y productoras al mismo tiempo
                    if (allEntities.includes('netflix')) platformName = 'netflix';
                    else if (allEntities.includes('disney') || allEntities.includes('marvel') || allEntities.includes('lucasfilm')) platformName = 'disney';
                    else if (allEntities.includes('amazon') || allEntities.includes('prime')) platformName = 'amazon';
                    else if (allEntities.includes('hbo') || allEntities.includes('warner') || allEntities.includes('max')) platformName = 'hbo';
                    else if (allEntities.includes('apple')) platformName = 'apple';
                    else if (allEntities.includes('hulu')) platformName = 'hulu';
                    else if (allEntities.includes('paramount') || allEntities.includes('cbs') || allEntities.includes('showtime')) platformName = 'paramount';
                    // === AGREGADO DE FALLBACK ===
                    // Si es "Sony" u otra cadena común, lo puedes mapear a Amazon u otra que prefieras, 
                    // o lo dejamos con su nombre original y tú lo añades al diccionario.
                    else if (allEntities.includes('sony') || allEntities.includes('rai 1')) platformName = 'amazon'; // Doc es de Rai1 pero lo mapeamos a Amazon para la prueba
                    // Si tienes series de CBS (CSI), ABC, FOX y quieres que salgan con un marco, mapealas aquí o añade sus marcos:
                    else if (allEntities.includes('cbs')) platformName = 'amazon'; // Temporal para CSI y ver si funciona el marco



                    // === NUEVA BÚSQUEDA AVANZADA EN PROVEEDORES DE STREAMING ===
                    // Si el creador original es un canal local (ej. Caracol, RCN, Televisa, etc.) y no es una plataforma global,
                    // le pedimos a TMDB que busque en qué plataforma se transmite actualmente (Watch Providers) en Perú (PE) o Global.
                    if (!['netflix','disney','amazon','hbo','apple','hulu','paramount'].includes(platformName)) {
                        try {
                            const providersUrl = `https://api.themoviedb.org/3/${type}/${item.id}/watch/providers?api_key=${TMDB_API_KEY}`;
                            const provRes = await fetch(providersUrl);
                            const provData = await provRes.json();

                            let providersList = '';
                            const results = provData.results || {};

                            // Buscar en todos los países disponibles en TMDB
                            let allProviders = [];
                            Object.values(results).forEach(country => {
                                if (country.flatrate) {
                                    country.flatrate.forEach(p => allProviders.push(p.provider_name.toLowerCase()));
                                }
                            });

                            providersList = allProviders.join(' ');

                            // Asignación de marco (Prioridad de las más grandes)
                            if (providersList.includes('netflix')) platformName = 'netflix';
                            else if (providersList.includes('disney') || providersList.includes('star+')) platformName = 'disney';
                            else if (providersList.includes('max') || providersList.includes('hbo')) platformName = 'hbo';
                            else if (providersList.includes('amazon') || providersList.includes('prime')) platformName = 'amazon';
                            else if (providersList.includes('apple')) platformName = 'apple';
                            else if (providersList.includes('paramount')) platformName = 'paramount';
                            else if (providersList.includes('hulu')) platformName = 'hulu';
                            else if (providersList.includes('hulu')) platformName = 'hulu';
                        } catch(e) {
                            console.error("Error buscando proveedores", e);
                        }
                    }

                    const result = {
                        id: item.id,
                        title: details.name || details.title,
                        overview: overview,
                        backdrop: details.backdrop_path ? 'https://image.tmdb.org/t/p/original' + details.backdrop_path : '',
                        logo: logo,
                        year: (details.first_air_date || details.release_date || '').substring(0,4),
                        genres: details.genres ? details.genres.map(g => g.name).join(', ') : '',
                        vote: details.vote_average ? details.vote_average.toFixed(1) : '',
                        platform: platformName
                    };

                    if(!window.tmdbCache) window.tmdbCache = {};
                    window.tmdbCache[cacheKey] = result;
                    return result;
                }
            } catch(e) {
                console.error("TMDB error", e);
            }
            return null;
        }

        async function fetchAndParseM3U(urls) {
            const cacheKey = String(urls);
            if (window.appCache[cacheKey]) {
                console.log("M3U cargado desde caché local:", cacheKey);
                return window.appCache[cacheKey];
            }

            const urlArray = Array.isArray(urls) ? urls : [urls];
            let allItems = [];
            let itemCounter = 0;

            for (let u of urlArray) {
                try {
                    let text = '';
                    try {
                        const res = await fetch('https://api.codetabs.com/v1/proxy?quest=' + encodeURIComponent(u));
                        text = await res.text();
                    } catch (err) {
                        const res2 = await fetch(u);
                        text = await res2.text();
                    }

                    const lines = text.split('\n');
                    let currentItem = {};
                    let currentGrp = 'General';

                    for (let line of lines) {
                        line = line.trim();
                        if (line.startsWith('#EXTGRP:')) {
                            currentGrp = line.substring(8).trim();
                        } else if (line.startsWith('#EXTINF:')) {
                            const logoMatch = line.match(/tvg-logo="([^"]+)"/);
                            const groupMatch = line.match(/group-title="([^"]+)"/);
                            const nameMatch = line.match(/,(.+)$/);

                            let logoUrl = (logoMatch && logoMatch[1] && logoMatch[1].trim() !== '') ? logoMatch[1] : '';
                            let subGrp = groupMatch ? groupMatch[1].trim() : 'General';

                            currentItem = {
                                stream_id: 'm3u_' + itemCounter++,
                                name: nameMatch ? nameMatch[1].trim() : 'Desconocido',
                                stream_icon: logoUrl,
                                cover: logoUrl,
                                extgrp: currentGrp,
                                category: subGrp, 
                                group_title: subGrp,
                                direct_url: ''
                            };
                        } else if (line && !line.startsWith('#')) {
                            if (currentItem.name) {
                                currentItem.direct_url = line;
                                if (!currentItem.stream_icon) currentItem.stream_icon = 'https://placehold.co/250x380/1a1a1a/cccccc/png?text=Sin+Poster';
                                if (!currentItem.cover) currentItem.cover = currentItem.stream_icon;

                                allItems.push(currentItem);
                                currentItem = {};
                            }
                        }
                    }
                } catch(e) {
                    console.error("Error cargando URL M3U:", u, e);
                }
            }

            const parsedData = { items: allItems };
            window.appCache[cacheKey] = parsedData;
            return parsedData;
        }

        
        async function loadM3uGroups(url, listName) {
            document.querySelector('.sidebar').style.display = 'none';
            const grid = document.getElementById('content-grid');
            grid.innerHTML = '<h2 style="width:100%;text-align:left;color:white;">Cargando...</h2>';

            const parsed = await fetchAndParseM3U(url);
            if (!parsed || parsed.items.length === 0) {
                grid.innerHTML = '<h2 style="width:100%;text-align:left;color:red;">Error o lista vacía</h2>';
                setTimeout(() => loadCategories('m3u'), 2000);
                return;
            }

            m3uGlobalItems = parsed.items;

            // Agrupar solo por group-title (si no existe, usar #EXTGRP como respaldo, sino 'General')
            const grps = {};
            parsed.items.forEach(item => {
                // HEURÍSTICA INTELIGENTE:
                // Si la categoría contiene "Temporada" o "Season", significa que es una Serie/Novela y el group-title es la temporada, por lo que usamos #EXTGRP como saga principal.
                // Si NO, asumimos que es una Película/Saga normal donde group-title agrupa todas las películas correctamente y #EXTGRP podría estar contaminado con el año.
                let isSerie = item.group_title && (item.group_title.toLowerCase().includes('temporada') || item.group_title.toLowerCase().includes('season'));
                let gTitle = 'General';

                if (isSerie) {
                    gTitle = (item.extgrp && item.extgrp !== 'General' && item.extgrp !== '') ? item.extgrp : item.group_title;
                } else {
                    gTitle = (item.group_title && item.group_title !== 'General' && item.group_title !== '') ? item.group_title : item.extgrp;
                }

                if (!gTitle) gTitle = 'General';

                if (!grps[gTitle]) {
                    const customCover = customM3uCovers[gTitle] || item.cover;
                    grps[gTitle] = { name: gTitle, cover: customCover, items: [] };
                }
                grps[gTitle].items.push(item);
            });

            const grpKeys = Object.keys(grps);
            if (grpKeys.length === 1 && grpKeys[0] === 'General') {
                // Si todo está sin grupo, mostrar episodios de frente
                loadM3uEpisodes(grps['General'], url, listName, true, null);
                return;
            }

            // Si hay grupos reales
            let idToRestore = lastFocusedCardId;
            window.currentBackAction = () => { lastFocusedCardId = idToRestore; loadCategories('m3u'); };
            grid.innerHTML = '';
            
            // Contenedor del título y el botón de recargar
            const titleContainer = document.createElement('div');
            titleContainer.style.width = '100%';
            titleContainer.style.display = 'flex';
            titleContainer.style.justifyContent = 'center';
            titleContainer.style.alignItems = 'center';
            titleContainer.style.gap = '20px';
            titleContainer.style.marginBottom = '40px';

            const titleObj = document.createElement('h2');
            titleObj.style.textAlign = 'center';
            titleObj.style.fontSize = '3rem';
            titleObj.style.color = 'white';
            titleObj.style.margin = '0';
            titleObj.innerText = listName + ' - Sagas/Categorías';

            const btnReloadM3u = document.createElement('button');
            btnReloadM3u.id = 'btn-reload-m3u';
            btnReloadM3u.className = 'focusable';
            btnReloadM3u.tabIndex = 0;
            btnReloadM3u.innerText = '🔄 RECARGAR';
            btnReloadM3u.style.padding = '10px 20px';
            btnReloadM3u.style.fontSize = '1.5rem';
            btnReloadM3u.style.background = '#00e5ff';
            btnReloadM3u.style.color = '#000';
            btnReloadM3u.style.fontWeight = 'bold';
            btnReloadM3u.style.borderRadius = '10px';
            btnReloadM3u.style.cursor = 'pointer';
            btnReloadM3u.style.border = '4px solid transparent';
            btnReloadM3u.style.outline = 'none';

            btnReloadM3u.onclick = () => {
                delete window.appCache[url];
                loadM3uGroups(url, listName);
            };

            btnReloadM3u.addEventListener('focus', function() { this.style.borderColor = 'white'; this.style.transform = 'scale(1.05)'; });
            btnReloadM3u.addEventListener('blur', function() { this.style.borderColor = 'transparent'; this.style.transform = 'scale(1)'; });

            titleContainer.appendChild(titleObj);
            titleContainer.appendChild(btnReloadM3u);
            grid.appendChild(titleContainer);



            grpKeys.forEach(key => {
                const grp = grps[key];
