                const card = document.createElement('button');
                card.className = 'card focusable';
                card.id = 'grp-' + encodeURIComponent(key).replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9]/g, '');
                
                card.innerHTML = `
                    <div style="position:relative; width:100%; height:100%;">
                        <img class="main-poster" src="${grp.cover}" onerror="this.src='https://placehold.co/250x380/1a1a1a/cccccc/png?text=${encodeURIComponent(grp.name)}'" style="width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:cover; transform: scale(1.04);">
                        <img class="frame-overlay" src="" style="position:absolute; top:-2%; left:-6%; width:112%; height:108.5%; object-fit:fill !important; pointer-events:none; display:none; z-index:4; border-radius: 14px; background: transparent;">
                    </div>
                    <p class="m3u-title" style="z-index:5;">${grp.name}</p>`;

                card.dataset.title = grp.name;
                card.dataset.istv = (listName.toLowerCase() !== 'películas' && listName.toLowerCase() !== 'peliculas' && listName.toLowerCase() !== 'sagas');
                if (window.frameObserver) window.frameObserver.observe(card);

                card.onclick = () => {

                    lastFocusedCardId = card.id;
                    if (grp.items.length === 1) {
                        // Reproducimos directo si la saga solo tiene 1 película
                        playMedia(grp.items[0]);
                    } else {
                        window.history.pushState({view: "m3u-episodes"}, "");
                        loadM3uSeasons(m3uGlobalItems, grp.name, url, listName);
                    }
                };
                grid.appendChild(card);
            });
            setTimeout(() => {
                let target = null;
                if (lastFocusedCardId) target = document.getElementById(lastFocusedCardId);
                if (!target) target = grid.querySelector('.card');
                if (target) {
                    target.focus();
                    
                }
            }, 100);
        }

        
        
        async function loadM3uSeasons(allItems, mainGrpName, url, listName) {
            resetContentScroll();
            const grid = document.getElementById('content-grid');
            grid.innerHTML = '<h2 style="width:100%;text-align:left;color:white;margin-top:50px;">Cargando Información...</h2>';

            // Get all items belonging to this mainGrpName
            const grpItems = allItems.filter(item => {
                let isSerie = item.group_title && (item.group_title.toLowerCase().includes('temporada') || item.group_title.toLowerCase().includes('season'));
                let e = 'General';
                if (isSerie) {
                    e = (item.extgrp && item.extgrp !== 'General' && item.extgrp !== '') ? item.extgrp : item.group_title;
                } else {
                    e = (item.group_title && item.group_title !== 'General' && item.group_title !== '') ? item.group_title : item.extgrp;
                }
                if (!e) e = 'General';
                return e === mainGrpName;
            });

            // Group them by sub-season
            const seasons = {};
            let isSerieGlobal = false;
            grpItems.forEach(item => {
                let isSerie = item.group_title && (item.group_title.toLowerCase().includes('temporada') || item.group_title.toLowerCase().includes('season'));
                if(isSerie) isSerieGlobal = true;
                let subTitle = mainGrpName;
                if (isSerie) {
                    subTitle = item.group_title && item.group_title !== 'General' ? item.group_title : mainGrpName;
                }
                if (!seasons[subTitle]) {
                    seasons[subTitle] = { name: subTitle, cover: item.cover, items: [] };
                }
                seasons[subTitle].items.push(item);
            });

            const seasonKeys = Object.keys(seasons).sort();

            if (seasonKeys.length === 1 && !isSerieGlobal) {
                // Not a series, skip to episodes view
                loadM3uEpisodes(seasons[seasonKeys[0]], url, listName, false, null);
                return;
            }

            let idToRestore = lastFocusedCardId;
            window.currentBackAction = () => { lastFocusedCardId = idToRestore; loadM3uGroups(url, listName); };

            // Fetch TMDB data for the main title
            const tmdbInfo = await fetchTMDBData(mainGrpName, true);

            let bgImage = tmdbInfo && tmdbInfo.backdrop ? tmdbInfo.backdrop : (grpItems.length > 0 ? grpItems[0].cover : '');
            let logoHtml = tmdbInfo && tmdbInfo.logo ? `<img src="${tmdbInfo.logo}" style="max-width: 400px; max-height: 150px; object-fit: contain; margin-bottom: 20px;">` : `<h1 style="font-size: 5rem; margin: 0 0 20px 0;">${mainGrpName}</h1>`;
            let descHtml = tmdbInfo && tmdbInfo.overview ? tmdbInfo.overview : 'Explora los episodios y temporadas de esta serie.';
            let yearHtml = tmdbInfo && tmdbInfo.year ? `${tmdbInfo.year} • ` : '';
            let genresHtml = tmdbInfo && tmdbInfo.genres ? ` • ${tmdbInfo.genres}` : '';

            // Build the Banner HTML
            grid.innerHTML = `
                <div class="serie-banner" style="--bg-image: url('${bgImage}'); margin-top: -20px;">
                    <div class="overlay-right"></div>
                    <div class="overlay-bottom"></div>

                    <div style="position: relative; z-index: 10; max-width: 600px; color: white;">
                        ${logoHtml}

                        <h2 style="font-size: 1.5rem; margin-bottom: 10px; color: #ffea00;">${seasonKeys.length > 1 ? 'Múltiples Temporadas' : seasonKeys[0]}</h2>

                        <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 15px; font-size: 1.1rem; color: #ccc; font-weight: bold;">
                            <span style="background: rgba(255,255,255,0.2); padding: 2px 6px; border-radius: 4px;">14+</span>
                            <span style="background: rgba(255,255,255,0.2); padding: 2px 6px; border-radius: 4px;">HD</span>
                            <span>${yearHtml}${seasonKeys.length} Temporadas${genresHtml}</span>
                        </div>

                        <p style="font-size: 1.2rem; line-height: 1.5; margin-bottom: 30px; text-shadow: 1px 1px 3px black; display: -webkit-box; ">${descHtml}</p>

                        <div style="display: flex; gap: 15px; align-items: center;">
                            <button id="btn-play-serie" onfocus="const c = document.querySelector('.content'); if(c.scrollTo) c.scrollTo({top: 0, behavior: 'smooth'}); else c.scrollTop = 0;" class="focusable" style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; background: white; color: black; border: none; padding: 12px 30px; font-size: 1.2rem; font-weight: bold; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s;">
                                ▶ VER AHORA
                            </button>
                            <button id="btn-trailer-serie" onfocus="const c = document.querySelector('.content'); if(c.scrollTo) c.scrollTo({top: 0, behavior: 'smooth'}); else c.scrollTop = 0;" class="focusable" style="background: rgba(255,255,255,0.3); color: white; border: none; padding: 12px 30px; font-size: 1.2rem; font-weight: bold; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s;">
                                TRÁILER
                            </button>
                            <button id="btn-add-serie" onfocus="const c = document.querySelector('.content'); if(c.scrollTo) c.scrollTo({top: 0, behavior: 'smooth'}); else c.scrollTop = 0;" class="focusable" style="background: rgba(255,255,255,0.3); color: white; border: none; padding: 12px 20px; font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: bold; border-radius: 50%; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s;">
                                +
                            </button>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <h3 style="width: 100%; color: white; font-size: 2rem; margin-bottom: 20px;">Temporadas</h3>
                <div id="seasons-container" style="display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 30px; width: 100%;"></div>
            `;

            // Logic for "VER AHORA"
            const btnPlay = document.getElementById('btn-play-serie');
            btnPlay.onclick = () => {
                if (seasonKeys.length > 0 && seasons[seasonKeys[0]].items.length > 0) {
                    playMedia(seasons[seasonKeys[0]].items[0]);
                }
            };

            // Logic for "TRAILER"
            const btnTrailer = document.getElementById('btn-trailer-serie');
            btnTrailer.onclick = async () => {
                if (tmdbInfo && tmdbInfo.id) {
                    try {
                        const type = isSerieGlobal ? 'tv' : 'movie';
                        const res = await fetch(`https://api.themoviedb.org/3/${type}/${tmdbInfo.id}/videos?api_key=${TMDB_API_KEY}&language=es-ES`);
                        const data = await res.json();
                        let trailer = data.results && data.results.find(v => v.type === 'Trailer');
                        if (!trailer && data.results && data.results.length > 0) trailer = data.results[0]; // fallback to any video
                        if (trailer) {
                            window.open(`https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=${trailer.key}`, '_blank');
                        } else {
                            // If no Spanish trailer, try English
                            const resEn = await fetch(`https://api.themoviedb.org/3/${type}/${tmdbInfo.id}/videos?api_key=${TMDB_API_KEY}&language=en-US`);
                            const dataEn = await resEn.json();
                            const trailerEn = dataEn.results && dataEn.results.find(v => v.type === 'Trailer');
                            if (trailerEn) {
                                window.open(`https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=${trailerEn.key}`, '_blank');
                            } else {
                                alert("Tráiler no disponible");
                            }
                        }
                    } catch(e) { alert("Error cargando el tráiler"); }
                } else {
                    alert("Tráiler no disponible para este título");
                }
            };

            const seasonsContainer = document.getElementById('seasons-container');
            seasonKeys.forEach(sKey => {
                const season = seasons[sKey];
                const card = document.createElement('button');
                card.className = 'card focusable';
                card.id = 'season-' + encodeURIComponent(sKey).replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9]/g, '');
                card.innerHTML = `<img src="${season.cover}" loading="lazy" decoding="async" onerror="this.src='https://placehold.co/250x380/1a1a1a/cccccc/png?text=Sin+Poster'"><p>${season.name}</p>`;
                card.onclick = () => {
                    lastFocusedCardId = card.id;
                    window.history.pushState({view: "m3u-episodes"}, "");
                    loadM3uEpisodes(season, url, listName, false, mainGrpName);
                };
                seasonsContainer.appendChild(card);
            });

            setTimeout(() => {
                let target = null;
                if (lastFocusedCardId) target = document.getElementById(lastFocusedCardId);
                if (!target) target = document.getElementById('btn-play-serie');
                if (target) {
                    target.focus();
                    
                }
            }, 100);
        }


        function loadM3uEpisodes(grp, url, listName, isDirect, parentGrpName) {
            resetContentScroll();
            const grid = document.getElementById('content-grid');
            grid.innerHTML = '';

            if (isDirect) {
                let idToRestore = lastFocusedCardId;
            window.currentBackAction = () => { lastFocusedCardId = idToRestore; loadCategories('m3u'); };
            } else {
                let idToRestore = lastFocusedCardId;
                window.currentBackAction = () => { 
                    lastFocusedCardId = idToRestore;
                    if (parentGrpName) loadM3uSeasons(m3uGlobalItems, parentGrpName, url, listName);
                    else loadM3uGroups(url, listName); 
                };

                const title = document.createElement('h2');
                title.style.width = '100%';
                title.style.color = 'white';
                title.style.margin = '30px 40px 10px';
                title.style.fontSize = '34px';
                title.style.borderBottom = '3px solid var(--accent)';
                title.style.paddingBottom = '10px';
                title.innerText = grp.name !== 'General' ? grp.name : listName;
                grid.appendChild(title);
            }

            grp.items.forEach((item, index) => {
                const card = document.createElement('button');
                card.className = 'card focusable';
                card.id = 'ep-' + index;
                card.innerHTML = `<img src="${item.cover}" loading="lazy" decoding="async" onerror="this.src='https://placehold.co/250x380/1a1a1a/cccccc/png?text=Sin+Poster'"><p>${item.name}</p>`;
                card.onclick = () => {
                    lastFocusedCardId = card.id;
                    playMedia(item);
                };
                grid.appendChild(card);
            });

            setTimeout(() => {
                let target = null;
                if (lastFocusedCardId) target = document.getElementById(lastFocusedCardId);
                if (!target) target = grid.querySelector('.card');
                if (target) {
                    target.focus();
                    
                }
            }, 100);
        }

        async function loadCategories(type) {
            const container = document.getElementById('cat-container');
            container.innerHTML = '<div style="text-align:left; padding:20px;">Cargando...</div>';
            document.getElementById('content-grid').innerHTML = ''; // Limpiar el grid central

            if (type === 'm3u') {
                // Definir acción de regreso para salir del menú M3U
                window.currentBackAction = () => {
                    // Restaurar la UI al estado normal
                    document.querySelector('.sidebar').style.display = 'flex';
                    document.getElementById('content-grid').innerHTML = '';

                    // Volver al menú de inicio (Home Screen)
                    document.getElementById('main-app').style.display = 'none';
                    document.getElementById('home-screen').style.display = 'flex';
                    document.getElementById('btn-live').focus();
                    window.history.pushState({view: "home"}, "");

                    window.currentBackAction = null;
                };

                // Ocultar barra lateral
                document.querySelector('.sidebar').style.display = 'none';

                const grid = document.getElementById('content-grid');
                grid.innerHTML = '';

                // Mostrar título grande
                grid.innerHTML = '<h2 style="width: 100%; text-align: center; font-size: 3rem; margin-bottom: 40px; color: white;">SELECCIONA UNA LISTA</h2>';

                const playlistsContainer = document.createElement('div');
                playlistsContainer.style.display = 'flex';
                playlistsContainer.style.gap = '40px';
                playlistsContainer.style.justifyContent = 'center';
                playlistsContainer.style.width = '100%';
                playlistsContainer.style.flexWrap = 'wrap';

                m3uPlaylists.forEach(list => {
                    const btn = document.createElement('button');
                    btn.className = 'card focusable';

                    btn.style.width = '320px'; 
                    btn.style.height = '480px'; 
                    btn.style.margin = '40px 30px'; 

                    btn.innerHTML = `<img src="${list.image}" loading="lazy" decoding="async" style="width: 100%; height: calc(100% - 50px); object-fit: cover;"><p>${list.name}</p>`;
                    btn.onclick = () => {
                        loadM3uGroups(list.url, list.name);
                    };
                    playlistsContainer.appendChild(btn);
                });

                grid.appendChild(playlistsContainer);
                setTimeout(() => { if(playlistsContainer.firstChild) playlistsContainer.firstChild.focus(); }, 100);
                return;
            } else {
                document.querySelector('.sidebar').style.display = 'flex';
                const typeNames = { 'live': 'TV EN VIVO', 'vod': 'CINE', 'series': 'SERIES', 'm3u': 'LISTAS M3U' };
                document.getElementById('sidebar-header-text').innerText = 'CATEGORÍA ' + (typeNames[type] || '');
            }

            // Flujo normal de IPTV (Live, VOD, Series)
            const cats = await fetchWithCache(`${config.host}/player_api.php?username=${config.user}&password=${config.pass}&action=get_${type}_categories`);
            container.innerHTML = '';

            // Boton Buscar General
            const btnSearch = document.createElement('button');
            btnSearch.className = 'cat-item focusable';
            btnSearch.innerHTML = '🔍 BUSCAR';
            btnSearch.style.color = '#ffea00';
            btnSearch.onclick = () => { setActiveCat(btnSearch); showSearchUI(type); };
            container.appendChild(btnSearch);

            // Boton SEGUIR VIENDO (Historial)
            if (type === 'vod' || type === 'series') {
                const btnHistory = document.createElement('button');
                btnHistory.className = 'cat-item focusable';
                btnHistory.innerHTML = '⏱ SEGUIR VIENDO';
                btnHistory.style.color = '#ffea00';
                btnHistory.onclick = () => { setActiveCat(btnHistory); loadHistoryUI(type); };
                container.appendChild(btnHistory);

            const btnRefresh = document.createElement('button');
            btnRefresh.className = 'cat-item focusable';
            btnRefresh.innerHTML = '🔄 ACTUALIZAR DATOS';
            btnRefresh.style.color = '#00e5ff';
            btnRefresh.onclick = () => { 
                // Limpiar cache
                window.appCache = {};
        window.tmdbCache = {};
                loadCategories(type); 
            };
            container.appendChild(btnRefresh);

            }

            cats.forEach(c => {
                const b = document.createElement('button');
                b.className = 'cat-item focusable';
                b.innerText = c.category_name;
                b.onclick = () => {
                    document.querySelectorAll('.cat-item').forEach(el => el.classList.remove('active-cat'));
                    b.classList.add('active-cat');
                    loadContent(c.category_id, type);
                };
                container.appendChild(b);
            });
            setTimeout(() => { 
                if(container.firstChild) container.firstChild.focus(); 
                // AUTO-CARGAR LA PRIMERA CATEGORIA
                if(cats.length > 0) {
                    // Encontrar el boton de la categoria (no es Buscar ni Historial)
                    const catBtns = Array.from(container.querySelectorAll('.cat-item')).filter(b => !b.innerText.includes('BUSCAR') && !b.innerText.includes('SEGUIR'));
                    if (catBtns.length > 0) catBtns[0].classList.add('active-cat');
                    loadContent(cats[0].category_id, type);
                }
            }, 100);
        }

        async function loadContent(id, type) {
            resetContentScroll();
            window.currentBackAction = null;
            const grid = document.getElementById('content-grid');
            grid.innerHTML = "<h2 style='text-align:left;width:100%'>Cargando...</h2>";
            const action = type === 'live' ? 'get_live_streams' : (type === 'vod' ? 'get_vod_streams' : 'get_series');
            const data = await fetchWithCache(`${config.host}/player_api.php?username=${config.user}&password=${config.pass}&action=${action}&category_id=${id}`);
            grid.innerHTML = "";
            const side = document.getElementById('side-list'); side.innerHTML = "";
            data.forEach(item => {
                const card = document.createElement('button');
                card.className = 'card focusable';
                card.id = "card-" + (item.stream_id || item.series_id);
                card.setAttribute('data-full', JSON.stringify(item));
                card.innerHTML = `<img src="${item.stream_icon || item.cover || ''}" onerror="this.src='https://placehold.co/250x380/1a1a1a/cccccc/png?text=Sin+Poster'"><p>${item.name}</p>`;

                card.onclick = () => { 
                    lastFocusedCardId = card.id; 
                    if (type === 'series') {
                        item.category_id = id;
                        loadSeriesInfo(item);
                    } else {
                        playMedia(item); 
                    }
                };
                grid.appendChild(card);

                if(type === 'live') {
                    const q = document.createElement('button');
                    q.className = 'quick-item';
                    q.setAttribute('data-id', item.stream_id);
                    q.setAttribute('data-full', JSON.stringify(item));
                    q.innerText = item.name;
                    side.appendChild(q);
                }
            });
            setTimeout(() => { if(grid.firstChild) grid.firstChild.focus(); }, 100);
        }

        async function loadSeriesInfo(seriesItem) {
            resetContentScroll();
            window.history.pushState({view: "series-seasons"}, "");
            const grid = document.getElementById('content-grid');
            grid.innerHTML = "<h2 style='text-align:left;width:100%'>Cargando...</h2>";

            // Acción de atrás: volver a la lista de series
            window.currentBackAction = () => {
                loadContent(seriesItem.category_id, 'series');
            };

            try {
                const data = await fetchWithCache(`${config.host}/player_api.php?username=${config.user}&password=${config.pass}&action=get_series_info&series_id=${seriesItem.series_id}`);
                grid.innerHTML = "";

                if (data.episodes) {
                    const seasonKeys = Object.keys(data.episodes);
                    if (seasonKeys.length === 1) {
                        // SOLO UNA TEMPORADA: Cargar capítulos de frente
                        renderEpisodes(seasonKeys[0], data.episodes[seasonKeys[0]], seriesItem, false);
                    } else if (seasonKeys.length > 1) {
                        // VARIAS TEMPORADAS: Mostrar posters
                        seasonKeys.forEach(seasonNum => {
                            const card = document.createElement('button');
                            card.className = 'card focusable';
                            card.id = "season-" + seasonNum;

                            let cover = seriesItem.cover || seriesItem.stream_icon || '';
                            if (data.seasons) {
                                const sData = data.seasons.find(s => s.season_number == seasonNum);
                                if (sData && sData.cover) cover = sData.cover;
                            }

                            card.innerHTML = `<img src="${cover}" onerror="this.src='https://placehold.co/250x380/1a1a1a/cccccc/png?text=Temporada+${seasonNum}'"><p>Temporada ${seasonNum}</p>`;
                            card.onclick = () => {
                                lastFocusedCardId = card.id;
                                window.history.pushState({view: "series-episodes"}, "");
                                renderEpisodes(seasonNum, data.episodes[seasonNum], seriesItem, true);
                            };
                            grid.appendChild(card);
                        });
                        setTimeout(() => { if(grid.firstChild) grid.firstChild.focus(); }, 100);
                    } else {
                        grid.innerHTML = "<h2 style='text-align:left;width:100%'>No hay temporadas disponibles.</h2>";
                    }
                } else {
                    grid.innerHTML = "<h2 style='text-align:left;width:100%'>No hay capítulos disponibles.</h2>";
                }
            } catch(e) {
                grid.innerHTML = "<h2 style='text-align:left;width:100%;color:red;'>Error al cargar la serie</h2>";
                setTimeout(() => loadContent(seriesItem.category_id, 'series'), 2000);
            }
        }

        function renderEpisodes(seasonNum, episodes, seriesItem, hasMultipleSeasons) {
            resetContentScroll();
            const grid = document.getElementById('content-grid');
            grid.innerHTML = "";

            if (hasMultipleSeasons) {
                window.currentBackAction = () => {
                    loadSeriesInfo(seriesItem);
                };
            } else {
                window.currentBackAction = () => {
                    loadContent(seriesItem.category_id, 'series');
                };
            }

            const seasonTitle = document.createElement('h2');
            seasonTitle.style.width = '100%';
            seasonTitle.style.color = 'white';
            seasonTitle.style.margin = '30px 40px 10px';
            seasonTitle.style.fontSize = '34px';
            seasonTitle.style.borderBottom = '3px solid var(--accent)';
            seasonTitle.style.paddingBottom = '10px';
            seasonTitle.innerText = `Temporada ${seasonNum}`;
            grid.appendChild(seasonTitle);

            episodes.forEach(ep => {
                const card = document.createElement('button');
                card.className = 'card focusable';
                card.id = "ep-" + ep.id;

                const cover = (ep.info && ep.info.movie_image) ? ep.info.movie_image : (seriesItem.cover || seriesItem.stream_icon || '');
                const title = ep.title || `Capítulo ${ep.episode_num}`;

                card.innerHTML = `<img src="${cover}" onerror="this.src='https://placehold.co/250x380/1a1a1a/cccccc/png?text=Sin+Poster'"><p>${title}</p>`;

                card.onclick = () => {
                    lastFocusedCardId = card.id;
                    ep.name = seriesItem.name + " - T" + seasonNum + "E" + ep.episode_num + " " + title;
                    ep.stream_id = ep.id;
                    ep.direct_url = `${config.host}/series/${config.user}/${config.pass}/${ep.id}.${ep.container_extension || 'mp4'}`;
                    playMedia(ep);
                };
                grid.appendChild(card);
            });
            setTimeout(() => {
                const firstBtn = grid.querySelector('button');
                if (firstBtn) firstBtn.focus();
            }, 100);
        }

        let currentUrl = '';
        let currentPlayingItem = null;
        function playMedia(item) {
            currentPlayingItem = item;
            if (activeId === (item.stream_id || item.id) && document.getElementById('player-section').style.display === 'block') return;
            const v = document.getElementById('video-player');
            v.preload = 'auto';
            window.retryCount = 0;
            activeId = item.stream_id || item.id;
            activeItemData = item;

            document.getElementById('status-msg').innerHTML = `<div style="text-align:left">${item.seriesName ? item.seriesName + ' - ' + (item.name || item.title) : (item.name || item.title || 'Desconocido')}</div><div id="epg-info" style="font-size:18px; color:#aaa; margin-top:5px; font-weight:normal; display:none; text-align:left;">Cargando EPG...</div>`;
            if (currentType === 'live' && typeof fetchEPG === 'function') fetchEPG(activeId);

            document.getElementById('player-section').style.display = 'block';
            const tm = document.getElementById('track-menu');
            if (tm) tm.style.display = 'none';
            const ctrl = document.getElementById('movie-controls');
            ctrl.style.display = (currentType === 'live') ? 'none' : 'flex';
            if (currentType !== 'live') {
                /* Timeout delegated to v.play event */
            }

            showTitleTemp();
            document.getElementById('buffer-percent').innerText = '0%';
            if (typeof window.startBufferSimulation === 'function') window.startBufferSimulation();

            let url = item.direct_url ? item.direct_url : ((currentType === 'live') ? `${config.host}/live/${config.user}/${config.pass}/${activeId}.m3u8` : `${config.host}/movie/${config.user}/${config.pass}/${activeId}.${item.container_extension || 'mp4'}`);
            currentUrl = url;
            
            v.onerror = function() { 
                if (currentType !== 'live' && document.getElementById('player-section').style.display === 'block') { 
                    window.retryCount = window.retryCount || 0;
                    if (window.retryCount < 3) {
                        window.retryCount++;
                        console.log("Error de reproducción, reintentando... (" + window.retryCount + "/3)");
                        document.getElementById('status-msg').innerHTML = `<div style="text-align:left; color:#ffcc00; font-size:32px;">Reconectando servidor... (${window.retryCount}/3)</div>`;
                        document.getElementById('status-msg').classList.add('visible');
                        document.getElementById('loader').style.display = 'block';
                        setTimeout(() => {
                            if(currentUrl) v.src = currentUrl;
                            v.load();
                            v.play().catch(e=>{});
                        }, 2000);
                    } else {
                        document.getElementById('loader').style.display = 'none'; 
                        document.getElementById('status-msg').innerHTML = `<div style="text-align:left; color:#ff4444; font-size:32px; padding: 20px;">Error: El servidor no responde o el enlace está dañado.<br><span style="font-size:20px; color:#ccc;">Verifique su conexión o pruebe otra película.</span></div>`; 
                        document.getElementById('status-msg').classList.add('visible');
                        setTimeout(() => { closePlayer(); }, 5000);
                    }
                } 
            };

            const startPlayback = (startTime = 0) => {
                const overlay = document.getElementById('resume-overlay');
                if (overlay) overlay.style.display = 'none';

                // Mostrar el loader inmediatamente
                document.getElementById('loader').style.display = 'block';
                document.getElementById('buffer-percent').innerText = '0%';

                if (Hls.isSupported() && url.includes('.m3u8')) {
                    if (hls) hls.destroy();
                    const hlsConfig = {
            enableWorker: true,
            lowLatencyMode: currentType === 'live',
            backBufferLength: 90,
            maxBufferLength: currentType === 'live' ? 10 : 30, 
            maxMaxBufferLength: currentType === 'live' ? 20 : 600,
            maxBufferSize: 60 * 1000 * 1000,
            startFragPrefetch: true,
            capLevelToPlayerSize: true 
        };
                    hls = new Hls(hlsConfig);
                    hls.loadSource(url);
                    hls.attachMedia(v);
                    hls.on(Hls.Events.MANIFEST_PARSED, () => { 
                        if (hls.audioTracks && hls.audioTracks.length > 0) {
                            let spaIdx = hls.audioTracks.findIndex(t => t.name.toLowerCase().includes('spa') || t.name.toLowerCase().includes('latino') || t.lang.toLowerCase().includes('es'));
                            if (spaIdx !== -1) hls.audioTrack = spaIdx;
                        }
                        if (startTime > 0) {
                            v.currentTime = startTime;
                        }
                        setTimeout(() => {
                            v.play().catch(e => console.log("HLS Play Error", e));
                        }, 200);
                    });
                    hls.on(Hls.Events.FRAG_LOAD_PROGRESS, (event, data) => {
                        if (data.stats && data.stats.total > 0) {
                            const percent = Math.min(100, Math.round((data.stats.loaded / data.stats.total) * 100));
                            document.getElementById('buffer-percent').innerText = percent + '%';
                        }
                    });
                    hls.on(Hls.Events.FRAG_BUFFERED, () => {
                        const loader = document.getElementById('loader');
                        if(loader && loader.style.display === 'block') document.getElementById('buffer-percent').innerText = '100%';
                    });
                    hls.on(Hls.Events.ERROR, (event, data) => {
                        if (data.fatal) {
                            document.getElementById('buffer-percent').innerText = 'Error';
                            window.retryCount = window.retryCount || 0;
                            if (window.retryCount < 3) {
                                window.retryCount++;
                                console.log("HLS Error, reintentando... (" + window.retryCount + "/3)");
                                document.getElementById('status-msg').innerHTML = `<div style="text-align:left; color:#ffcc00; font-size:32px;">Reconectando servidor... (${window.retryCount}/3)</div>`;
                                document.getElementById('status-msg').classList.add('visible');
                                document.getElementById('loader').style.display = 'block';

                                if (data.type === Hls.ErrorTypes.NETWORK_ERROR) {
                                    hls.startLoad();
                                } else if (data.type === Hls.ErrorTypes.MEDIA_ERROR) {
                                    hls.recoverMediaError();
                                } else {
                                    hls.destroy();
                                    setTimeout(() => startPlayback(startTime || 0), 2000);
                                }
                            } else {
                                document.getElementById('loader').style.display = 'none'; 
                                document.getElementById('status-msg').innerHTML = `<div style="text-align:left; color:#ff4444; font-size:32px; padding: 20px;">Error: El servidor M3U no responde o el enlace caducó.<br><span style="font-size:20px; color:#ccc;">Verifique su conexión o pruebe otro canal.</span></div>`; 
                                document.getElementById('status-msg').classList.add('visible');
                                setTimeout(() => { closePlayer(); }, 5000);
                            }
                        }
                    });
                } else {
                    v.src = url;

                    // LG WebOS FIX: SIEMPRE esperar a que cargue la meta-información antes de darle Play, sea o no desde 0.
                    const onMeta = () => {
                        if (startTime > 0) {
                            v.currentTime = startTime;
                        }
                        v.removeEventListener('loadedmetadata', onMeta);
                        v.play().catch(e => console.log("Play interrupted", e));
                    };
                    v.addEventListener('loadedmetadata', onMeta);

                    // Respaldo por si el evento no se dispara rápido
                    setTimeout(() => {
                        if (v.paused) v.play().catch(e => {});
                    }, 1500);
                }
            };

            const history = getHistory()[activeId];
            if (currentType !== 'live' && history && history.duration > 0 && history.time > (history.duration * 0.01) && history.time < (history.duration * 0.95)) {
                const overlay = document.getElementById('resume-overlay');
                if(overlay) {
                    overlay.style.display = 'flex';
                    document.getElementById('resume-time').innerText = `Te quedaste en: ${formatTime(history.time)}`;
                    const btnRes = document.getElementById('btn-resume');
                    const btnStart = document.getElementById('btn-restart');

                    // Asegurar navegacion teclado dentro del overlay
                    btnRes.onkeydown = (e) => {
                        if (e.keyCode === 39) { e.preventDefault(); btnStart.focus(); }
                        if (e.keyCode === 13) { e.preventDefault(); btnRes.click(); }
                        if (e.keyCode === 461 || e.keyCode === 27 || e.keyCode === 10009) { e.preventDefault(); overlay.style.display = 'none'; closePlayer(); }
                    };
                    btnStart.onkeydown = (e) => {
                        if (e.keyCode === 37) { e.preventDefault(); btnRes.focus(); }
                        if (e.keyCode === 13) { e.preventDefault(); btnStart.click(); }
                        if (e.keyCode === 461 || e.keyCode === 27 || e.keyCode === 10009) { e.preventDefault(); overlay.style.display = 'none'; closePlayer(); }
                    };

                    btnRes.onclick = () => startPlayback(history.time);
                    btnStart.onclick = () => startPlayback(0);

                    setTimeout(() => { btnRes.focus(); }, 100);
                } else {
                    startPlayback(0);
                }
            } else {
                startPlayback(0);
            }
        }

        function closePlayer() {
            const tm = document.getElementById('track-menu');
            if (tm) tm.style.display = 'none';
            const overlay = document.getElementById('resume-overlay');
            if (overlay) overlay.style.display = 'none';

            const v = document.getElementById('video-player');
            v.preload = 'auto';
            v.pause(); v.src = ""; if(hls) hls.destroy();

            document.getElementById('player-section').style.display = 'none';
            activeId = null;
            document.getElementById('loader').style.display = 'none';

            setTimeout(() => { const c = document.getElementById(lastFocusedCardId); if(c) { c.focus(); smartScroll(c); } }, 150);
        }

        function moveGrid(dir) {
            const isHome = document.activeElement.classList.contains('home-card');
            const selector = isHome ? '.home-card' : '.card';

            // Usar getElementsByClassName es mucho más rápido en Smart TVs que querySelectorAll
            const elements = document.getElementsByClassName(isHome ? 'home-card' : 'card');
            const cards = Array.prototype.slice.call(elements);
            const idx = cards.indexOf(document.activeElement);
            if(idx === -1) return;

            let cols = 1;
            if (isHome) {
                cols = 3;
            } else if (cards.length > 1) {
                // Optimización Extrema: Solo leemos offsetTop de los primeros elementos para no causar reflow masivo
                const firstY = cards[0].offsetTop;
                let found = false;
                // Buscamos el primer elemento que cambie de línea (sea por H3 o por wrap natural)
                const maxCheck = Math.min(cards.length, 12);
                for (let i = 1; i < maxCheck; i++) {
                    if (cards[i].offsetTop > firstY + 20) { // +20 para tolerar ligeras variaciones
                        cols = i;
                        found = true;
                        break;
                    }
                }
                // Las cards miden ~350px de ancho con margen. En 1080p caben unas 4 o 5.
                if (!found) cols = Math.min(cards.length, 5); // Backup asumiendo 5 columnas max
            }

            let next;
            if (dir === 39) next = cards[idx + 1];
            if (dir === 37) next = cards[idx - 1];
            if (dir === 40) {
                next = cards[idx + cols];
                if (!next && idx + cols >= cards.length) {
                    next = cards[cards.length - 1];
                }
            }
            if (dir === 38) next = cards[idx - cols];

            if (next) {
                next.focus();
                // scrollIntoView('smooth') a veces laguea en TVs antiguas, 'auto' o block 'center' es más rápido
                smartScroll(next);
            }
        }

        window.onpopstate = function() {
            if (document.getElementById('player-section').style.display === 'block') {
                const trackMenu = document.getElementById('track-menu');
                if (trackMenu && trackMenu.style.display === 'flex') {
                    closeTrackMenu();
                } else if (document.getElementById('quick-list-overlay').classList.contains('visible')) {
                    document.getElementById('quick-list-overlay').classList.remove('visible');
                } else {
                    closePlayer();
                }
                window.history.pushState({view: "main"}, "");
            } else if (document.getElementById('main-app').style.display === 'flex') {

                

                // Si hay una acción de regreso asignada (ej. en Series: Temporadas o Capítulos)
                if (window.currentBackAction) {
                    window.currentBackAction();
                    return;
                }

                // Si estamos en VIVO, CINE, SERIES o en "SELECCIONA UNA LISTA", salir al inicio.
                document.getElementById('main-app').style.display = 'none';
                document.getElementById('home-screen').style.display = 'flex';
                document.getElementById('btn-live').focus();
                window.history.pushState({view: "home"}, "");
            }
        };
    
        function populateTracks() {
            const v = document.getElementById('video-player');
            const aList = document.getElementById('audio-list');
            const sList = document.getElementById('sub-list');
            if(!v || !aList || !sList) return;
            aList.innerHTML = ''; sList.innerHTML = '';
            let hasAudio = false; let hasSubs = false;

            if (typeof hls !== 'undefined' && hls !== null) { 
                if(hls.audioTracks && hls.audioTracks.length > 0) {
                    hls.audioTracks.forEach((t, i) => {
                        hasAudio = true; const btn = document.createElement('button');
                        btn.className = 'track-item focusable' + (hls.audioTrack === i ? ' active' : '');
                        btn.innerText = t.name || t.lang || `Audio ${i+1}`;
                        btn.onclick = () => { hls.audioTrack = i; closeTrackMenu(); };
                        aList.appendChild(btn);
                    });
                }
                if(hls.subtitleTracks && hls.subtitleTracks.length > 0) {
                    const btnOff = document.createElement('button');
                    btnOff.className = 'track-item focusable' + (hls.subtitleTrack === -1 ? ' active' : '');
                    btnOff.innerText = 'Apagado';
                    btnOff.onclick = () => { hls.subtitleTrack = -1; closeTrackMenu(); };
                    sList.appendChild(btnOff);
                    hls.subtitleTracks.forEach((t, i) => {
                        hasSubs = true; const btn = document.createElement('button');
                        btn.className = 'track-item focusable' + (hls.subtitleTrack === i ? ' active' : '');
                        btn.innerText = t.name || t.lang || `Sub ${i+1}`;
                        btn.onclick = () => { hls.subtitleTrack = i; closeTrackMenu(); };
                        sList.appendChild(btn);
                    });
                }
            } else {
                if (v.audioTracks && v.audioTracks.length > 0) {
                    for(let i=0; i<v.audioTracks.length; i++) {
                        hasAudio = true; let t = v.audioTracks[i];
                        const btn = document.createElement('button');
                        btn.className = 'track-item focusable' + (t.enabled ? ' active' : '');
                        btn.innerText = t.language || t.label || `Audio ${i+1}`;
                        btn.onclick = () => { for(let j=0; j<v.audioTracks.length; j++) v.audioTracks[j].enabled = false; t.enabled = true; closeTrackMenu(); };
                        aList.appendChild(btn);
                    }
                }
                if (v.textTracks && v.textTracks.length > 0) {
                    const btnOff = document.createElement('button');
                    let anySubActive = Array.from(v.textTracks).some(tt => tt.mode === 'showing');
                    btnOff.className = 'track-item focusable' + (!anySubActive ? ' active' : '');
                    btnOff.innerText = 'Apagado';
                    btnOff.onclick = () => { for(let j=0; j<v.textTracks.length; j++) v.textTracks[j].mode = 'hidden'; closeTrackMenu(); };
                    sList.appendChild(btnOff);
                    for(let i=0; i<v.textTracks.length; i++) {
                        hasSubs = true; let t = v.textTracks[i];
                        const btn = document.createElement('button');
                        btn.className = 'track-item focusable' + (t.mode === 'showing' ? ' active' : '');
                        btn.innerText = t.language || t.label || `Sub ${i+1}`;
                        btn.onclick = () => { for(let j=0; j<v.textTracks.length; j++) v.textTracks[j].mode = 'hidden'; t.mode = 'showing'; closeTrackMenu(); };
                        sList.appendChild(btn);
                    }
                }
            }
            if(!hasAudio) aList.innerHTML = '<div style="color:#666; font-size:1.3rem;">Solo idioma original</div>';
            if(!hasSubs) sList.innerHTML = '<div style="color:#666; font-size:1.3rem;">No disponibles</div>';
        }
        function closeTrackMenu() {
            const tm = document.getElementById('track-menu');
            if(tm) tm.style.display = 'none';
            const tbtn = document.getElementById('btn-tracks');
            if(tbtn) tbtn.focus();
        }


        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
            const videoPlayer = document.getElementById('video-player');
            if(videoPlayer) {
                videoPlayer.addEventListener('ended', () => {
                    if (currentPlayingItem && currentPlayingItem.fullPlaylist) {
                        const nextIndex = currentPlayingItem.playlistIndex + 1;
                        if (nextIndex < currentPlayingItem.fullPlaylist.length) {

                            // Mostrar mensaje de auto-play
                            const alertBox = document.createElement('div');
                            alertBox.style.cssText = "position:absolute; top:50%; left:50%; transform:translate(-50%, -50%); background:rgba(207,6,82,0.9); color:white; padding:20px 40px; font-size:30px; font-weight:bold; border-radius:15px; z-index:100000; box-shadow:0 0 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.8);";
                            alertBox.innerText = "Reproduciendo siguiente capítulo...";
                            document.getElementById('player-section').appendChild(alertBox);

                            setTimeout(() => {
                                alertBox.remove();
                                playMedia(currentPlayingItem.fullPlaylist[nextIndex]);
                            }, 3000);
                        }
                    }
                });
            }
        });

    </script>
</body>
</html>
